name: Herschel Walker
subject: Endorsed by President Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

I wanted to be one of the first to share some exciting news...

**🚨🚨 I have the "Complete and Total Endorsement" of President Donald J. Trump! 🚨🚨**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58271285:J1z3sL2Ny:m:1:3253819041:D19470ADB178475A8898F0D45B3FC27D:r)
I got in this race to win next November. The stakes are too high, and I can't simply sit on the sidelines.

Peter, it's critical that we win back the Senate. And we can't do that without winning in Georgia.

body:

I have diligently and proudly served my community and country throughout my life, and I am looking forward to answering the call once again as your next Congressman in Alabama’s 5th district. President Trump accomplished so much in just one term, and I am committed to carrying on the good work that he started. From defending the unborn to protecting your Second Amendment rights to securing the border to cancelling Cancel Culture — I will fight hard to make it happen. **But I can’t do it without your help. Will you chip in just $1 today to show your support for my campaign?** [**CHIP IN $1 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/bb28d5d06ab2cb48/0a86f505b38732d1c3d6b838967d376c/36963) One buck barely seems like it will matter, but that’s the power of grassroots support. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No Prayer on 9/11?!
body:
Dear Peter, Liberal hypocrisy in Washington D.C. is at an all time high. Local D.C. Pastor, Reverend Pat Mahoney, wants to gather a prayer vigil on the lawn outside of the U.S. Capitol pray for peace and the protection of our country on the 20th anniversary of September 11th. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) **But unelected government bureaucrats and the U.S. Capitol Police Board****won 't let him.** And while Rev. Mahoney isn't allowed to exercise his God-given First Amendment right to pray for our nation... ...radical left-wing politicians and activists get a free pass to loudly and obnoxiously do whatever they want. That's why we're suing the U.S. Capitol Police Board for discriminately DENYING Rev. Mahoney's First Amendment right to peacefully assemble and exercise his faith. [**Will you help us take on the Capitol Police Board for its blatant attack on religious liberty?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) Let me explain... With the 20th Anniversary of September 11th right around the corner, Rev. Pat Mahoney filed a permit to gather a prayer vigil on the grounds of the U.S. Capitol. But there was one thing standing in his way... In order to hold the prayer vigil, the U.S. Capitol Police Board required Rev. Mahoney to obtain a permit. _ _ **A few days later, Rev. Mahoney learned that the Capitol Police Board DENIED his request.** When Rev. Mahoney asked why he wasn't allowed to pray outside of the Capitol - especially for something as important as the 20th Anniversary of 9/11 - the Capitol Police Board told him the area is "restricted" and that permit applications cannot be processed. But that just isn't true. Just recently, leftist Congresswoman Cori Bush and a handful of her left-wing activist friends slept on the Capitol steps for days in protesting one of their radical social justice policies--demanding an extension of the eviction moratorium. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) Another group recently got a permit to protest on the lawn outside the Capitol too. In other words, Rev. Mahoney wasn't denied because the area was actually "restricted" or closed. **He was denied the right to exercise his First Amendment freedoms because the U.S. Capitol Police Board thinks it has unfettered discretion to pick winners and losers with respect to constitutional rights.** [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board by sending a generous tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a leading constitutional rights attorney and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may have heard about the Center for American Liberty before. We're a nationwide network of patriotic, Constitution-loving attorneys who fight for individual liberty. And since 2019, we've successfully taken on "Big Tech," radical politicians, Antifa, and others who have tried to cancel our constitutionally guaranteed civil liberties for their own personal gain. **Now, we 're suing the U.S Capitol Police Board for denying Rev. Mahoney the right to gather and pray on this upcoming anniversary of September 11th. ** As a non-profit organization, the only way we can do that is with the generous financial support of patriotic Americans like you. [**That 's why I'm asking you to chip in $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty so we can fund this critical First Amendment lawsuit. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) This isn't the first time Nancy Pelosi and/or the U.S. Capitol Police Board censored Rev. Mahoney's prayers. Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) Earlier this year, Nancy Pelosi denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray for our nation lower western terrace of the U.S. Capitol on Good Friday. **A nd just recently, the Capitol Police ARRESTED Rev. Mahoney within 10 minutes for peacefully expressing his pro-life beliefs on the steps of the U.S. Capitol--the same spot where Rep. Bush and her friends were allowed to protest with impunity for DAYS.** It's plain as day that this is a coordinated attempt to silence a pastor simply because certain Washington elites don't agree with his message. **Denying a pastor the fundamental right to pray for the victims and families of 9/11 is sickening enough ...** But the fact that they won't let Rev. Mahoney gather to pray while other non-religious activities can go on at the EXACT same location is a gross violation of the First Amendment. [**Can I count on you to support our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board by sending a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) I look forward to hearing back from you right away. And thank you in advance for your kind support. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273506:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58273507:JQnaoL2FN:m:1:3253819041:6C4056A0C9DABA8C0A5099A9F6BD2D5F:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

| | Derek,

Virginia’s gubernatorial race is critical to the future of the Commonwealth and the future of the country. With the election just a few months away, we must all do our part to help my friend Terry win.

We see it across the country: Governors can stop attacks on our most fundamental rights as Americans. But right-wing governors take their states backward. With voting rights and reproductive freedom on the line for Virginians, we cannot take anything for granted. Poll after poll shows the race is essentially tied.

**The only way Terry can match his right-wing opponent’s resources is by building the largest grassroots donor team in Virginia history.**

****
Terry’s opponent isn’t just proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement; he supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories about the 2020 election. He was even caught on tape saying that he would hide his extreme views on banning abortion and defunding Planned Parenthood from the voters of Virginia.

_Derek, here’s the deal: Terry must win._

Terry is a champion for reproductive rights and the freedom to vote. As governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive, and forward-looking states in the country.

This is not just about electing Terry; it’s also about sending a message to the entire country that candidates who oppose reproductive rights and voting rights -- and who spread Donald Trump’s big lie -- will lose.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Maryland is the most diverse state on the East Coast
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]SIGN IF YOU AGREE: Maryland’s next Governor needs to promote diversity and inclusion within state government. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hDwNGaiHdEyHnaURx4KcHA2]
Dear Peter,
We draw strength from our diversity -- and recognizing that fact is more important than ever before. According to the 2020 Census, we have reached a groundbreaking demographic milestone. Maryland is now the most diverse state on the East Coast thanks to our growing Asian and Latino populations.
I believe that Marylanders deserve a government that represents the great diversity of its people. That’s why as your next Governor, I’m going to make Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) a foundational element of state government.
I’ll establish a cabinet-level Secretary of DEI responsible for promoting diversity in government, assessing existing and proposed state policies to identify biases and disparate impacts, and developing policies to promote economic relief to communities that have been structurally denied opportunity. I am also committed to selecting a Black woman as my running mate in the months ahead.
Right now, I’m looking to get 1,000 signatures from grassroots followers to support my plan to promote Diversity, Equity and Inclusion in state government. The more signatures we can get, the greater the message we can send. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hDwNGaiHdEyHnaURx4KcHA2]
I believe that my administration cannot claim to work for all Marylanders without transparently addressing past and present wrongs, and ensuring that they do not continue. That’s why as part of my plan, I will focus on proactively addressing the ill effects of policies that have created unequal outcomes and institutionalized biases.
This includes addressing the ongoing effects of redlining, which has prevented many Black Marylanders from building generational wealth through housing. To that end, I’ll partner with state-chartered community banks, local credit unions, and other community-focused lenders to provide state-backed mortgage loans to communities of color with a goal of creating parity in new homeownership rates by the end of my first term.
If you believe that we need to take bold steps to right past wrongs, and make sure that state government empowers the many diverse communities that it represents, then let me know that you stand with me on this issue. I’m looking to get 1,000 signatures from grassroots supporters before midnight tonight. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hDwNGaiHdEyHnaURx4KcHA2]
Racial animus and exclusion belong in the past. The 21st Century needs to be one of inclusion and empowerment for all races, colors and creeds -- and it will be, so long as we fight to make it that way.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em090721]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/61745009-9a0a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/21153841-ec0f-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTE1Mzg0MS1lYzBmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8XJotESt6OmKh27WPdx1RAfGA3jdmBChLgcVPtLz10=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

If you haven’t reserved your tickets yet, you can do so here [] . I’m humbled by the folks who have joined the event host committee in support of this campaign and would love to add you to the list. name: Chesney, Campaign Manager
subject: Fwd: Breaking news in AZ-02
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Did you see the breaking news Kirsten shared about the race for AZ-02?
Friend,

I just wanted to bump this email for you in case you missed it. True to form, Kirsten is being a little modest here. So allow me to be blunt: **Kirsten is the only one who can win this race and keep this seat blue in 2022.** She has never lost an election and has represented this district in the State Legislature for the past five years. As a working mom and law school professor, her ties to the university and surrounding communities run deep. And as the only woman running in a district that has historically supported strong women for this office, she’s not only the best choice for the Primary, she is the best choice for making sure we keep this seat blue in the General Election, as well.

I hope you will excuse my bluntness, but **we need your support and we need it now.** As Kirsten mentioned earlier, Republicans are practically salivating at the thought of taking this district back. And let’s not forget that only four short years ago, they controlled this seat with Martha McSally.

For those of you that follow campaigns closely, you know that we have our end of quarter deadline coming up this month. Now that Kirsten is the clear frontrunner, **we MUST demonstrate strong support to keep this district blue.**

[**Can you rush a donation of any amount to the campaign today to show Kirsten has the grassroots support necessary to win?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35364406/304824932/41694283?refcode=X_090321_BreakingNewsBump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEzMDZlZC1mNDBmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVXdqkuGiQrpnS11Ud4hlTwUBHzFweMT0fqzm9kYugQ=)

From: **Kirsten Engel** <info@kirstenengel.com>
Date: Fri, Sep 3, 2021 at 12:01 PM
Subject: BREAKING: major update on the race in AZ-02

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35364412/304824938/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEzMDZlZC1mNDBmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVXdqkuGiQrpnS11Ud4hlTwUBHzFweMT0fqzm9kYugQ=&emci=a71a02e8-e80c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=1b1306ed-f40f-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)
---

Yesterday, my primary opponent, Dr. Randy Friese announced that he was leaving the race to focus on his career as an emergency room surgeon. **I’ve always known Randy to be a dedicated public servant and colleague at the State Legislature.** I’m sure this was a difficult decision to make, but I know he will continue to serve his community well in his capacity as a physician, and I wish him the best with his future endeavors.

Today, I’m reaching out to Democrats across Southern Arizona and asking them to join our campaign. Randy and I shared many of the same goals, including enacting common sense gun safety reforms, addressing climate change, protecting medicare and social security, and standing up for working families across our region.

Many pundits are forecasting a Republican takeover of Congress in 2022. Democratic turnout tends to be lower in midterm elections and losing control of Congress is a very real possibility. Think back to the GOP waves of 2010 & 2012 -- not great years for Democrats. Republicans are targeting a handful of districts, and ours is at the very top of that list. In fact, Governor Ducey’s right-hand man has been chosen by the GOP establishment to flip this seat. Wealthy corporations and special interest groups are going to spend millions to help him buy this seat back for the Republicans.

Now is the time that we must unify as Democrats and prepare for what will be a very difficult, but very winnable race. I’m asking you to join our campaign today with a contribution of any amount. Whether you can give $5, $50, $500, or some other amount, every dollar helps us keep this seat, and possibly Congress itself, in Democratic hands.

If you’re not yet ready to join us, I look forward to earning your support in the weeks to come.

Onward,
Kirsten

---

clean_body: Did you see the breaking news Kirsten shared about the race for AZ-02? Friend, I just wanted to bump this email for you in case you missed it. True to form, Kirsten is being a little modest here. So allow me to be blunt: Kirsten is the only one who can win this race and keep this seat blue in 2022. She has never lost an election and has represented this district in the State Legislature for the past five years. As a working mom and law school professor, her ties to the university and surrounding communities run deep. And as the only woman running in a district that has historically supported strong women for this office, she’s not only the best choice for the Primary, she is the best choice for making sure we keep this seat blue in the General Election, as well. I hope you will excuse my bluntness, but we need your support and we need it now. As Kirsten mentioned earlier, Republicans are practically salivating at the thought of taking this district back. And let’s not forget that only four short years ago, they controlled this seat with Martha McSally. For those of you that follow campaigns closely, you know that we have our end of quarter deadline coming up this month. subject: I'm about to lose my damn voice here

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xu_XmCg6k9JUzYoD5XeS8eNrZriDHOT3vf4Ezf_-eMgKZ2u1KPwc6mj_wVg0pcz3Z5jQD3zSWtqTvB2T_y1UQf5guNWaKmYxk4BZp9RILlTo4wGNVPq4gpDGcLYD0iQbOEa6Q5yM329gdDysNTiGPVKJBNmkQcl9ZYEccLqdXD3Ckrudr6ib9nTyPXos7CeEeT4QyylvxJphoWL6mYsH19gg24HMvwiKTa60Mz37CTawWWEVspOppGyimUTQ_mXuiJL46mbwAD06NxmjeoVOOo4ooMSkigEy8o1nhnh5DcrL/3f4/tvWcUUwiQ9md8chT5kgsNg/h0/nIMCoo_m07iMgvup_Oa7DTupIgdqzINbunS-LD2duqw)
Derek, I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xu_XmCg6k9JUzYoD5XeS8eN70VvwEj49v048UFwnhtgV9keelhih0zYLmz97AWQcrRINnZRJAL9_-JOj6JOWPB2er2Mq54zhJ6iTsUXXHnKHvV5Yl2KHwgsQux0-6_2i31XdxsjBpSP6ahsAfLiqO96TxA2nCKb8PV8GaImK7_nz7BDyNAl5RRHyrj2_apMfvoIJ2Y1r2MuA3AOSGa5cn9wtTmLzqlj3V6MIuo5K1UU5M0bcgkcGX0o-SMbWrnc7hZLIz21RCt_29t7hqkZoglHk6pdBhgqSlsNk6Ts-gX88/3f4/tvWcUUwiQ9md8chT5kgsNg/h1/v1U5qwILkxSrhsx9txhkBMI0oSrifudpPEY6gOGILfw) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xu_XmCg6k9JUzYoD5XeS8eN982QyUbTy1jCKFJcvJgxLFOMT_FqqL1hCRESiWVGVDZAWO2UiVCEuMb-YJpIzpFCxupvy08Cy7XWuB6lEuyuQtTh2b3i2KQRjOnWxlaw75OPyK5uolIoqFAyEwFHk6J21rz7p8iAyTp1FI_CUrO-x8BsgWrdgmOxnVN35G8XBuS1xEAUGUowxlMNMB9i6uDCxGmMubaBqvPsfCCFwLFZuYr0Er7wY8Qfz2RkYb50GMio8iFsDs3MTfcZOfKak3i8eMkAtMnAztZqxWgntxwIB/3f4/tvWcUUwiQ9md8chT5kgsNg/h2/1K5jZvR-eRi4axW4OTDXtd0EKB_uVGcStwU8Fyb93dw)

In the age of Citizens United, money talks. But together, we’re gonna show the pundits and the national Republicans watching this race that we’ve got a winning team that’s ready to see this thing through to the end.

Thank you,

Tim

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Senator Chuck Schumer Caught in a Lie

name: Kolin Kearns
subject: Tell the Senate: Support workers & pass the PRO Act
body:
| | Friend, **Yesterday was Labor Day, but still it’s not too late to speak up for workers’ rights.** Congress is currently considering the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, the most significant pro-labor legislation since the National Labor Relations Act became law in 1935. The PRO Act would restore the right to join a union and help workers negotiate safer workplace conditions, higher wages, and better benefits. While it passed the House of Representatives earlier this year, the Senate has yet to take it up for a vote. clean_body: | | Friend, Yesterday was Labor Day, but still it’s not too late to speak up for workers’ rights. Congress is currently considering the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, the most significant pro-labor legislation since the National Labor Relations Act became law in 1935. The PRO Act would restore the right to join a union and help workers negotiate safer workplace conditions, higher wages, and better benefits. While it passed the House of Representatives earlier this year, the Senate has yet to take it up for a vote. The labor movement’s hard-fought victories have given us weekends, the 40-hour workweek, paid vacation, sick leave, work breaks, and bans on child labor. Their contributions have helped workers provide for their families and saved lives. Despite these accomplishments, wealthy corporations and Republican politicians have spent recent decades systematically eroding the power of union rights across our nation. These efforts have fueled economic and racial inequality and made workplaces more dangerous. Corporate interests are plotting to spend millions of dollars to defeat the PRO Act, but we can’t let them succeed. Working families are the backbone of this country, and together, we have the power to make history by getting the PRO Act to President Biden’s desk. | "Take action" Thank you, Kolin Kearns National Digital Campaigns Manager NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

So regardless of whether you choose to mail your ballot in or vote in person on Election Day, please be sure to:

2. **Vote FOR Kevin Faulconer** when asked which candidate should succeed Newsom.

Time is running out, Peter. So please, act immediately. Thanks for your vital support, Team Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b3e535e17cfda3/8cb4fe208c84a147c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b3e535e17cfda3/ab6bcbfd181cb915c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b3e535e17cfda3/05cbfa8ac2cad93bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30b3e535e17cfda3/6b0c95dc40daa553c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

We're running out of time, friend. **September is the final month before our big FEC fundraising deadline, and we're not where we need to be.** With Maggie down in the polls, it's critical that we meet this goal to close our polling gap and create a strong foundation for 2022. In 2016, Maggie’s race shattered New Hampshire spending records, and it was a tough fight that came down to just a handful of votes. **When the dust settled, she won by only 1,017 votes: one of the closest Senate races in history.** News outlets across the country are calling Maggie the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection. In the past few weeks, two McConnell-linked super PACs announced huge ad buys attacking Maggie. **With over $4 million already spent, this race is shaping up to break spending records yet again.** But time is running out. clean_body: | | | We're running out of time, friend. September is the final month before our big FEC fundraising deadline, and we're not where we need to be. With Maggie down in the polls, it's critical that we meet this goal to close our polling gap and create a strong foundation for 2022. In 2016, Maggie’s race shattered New Hampshire spending records, and it was a tough fight that came down to just a handful of votes. When the dust settled, she won by only 1,017 votes: one of the closest Senate races in history. News outlets across the country are calling Maggie the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection. In the past few weeks, two McConnell-linked super PACs announced huge ad buys attacking Maggie. With over $4 million already spent, this race is shaping up to break spending records yet again. But time is running out. With our Democratic majority on the line, we can't afford to fall short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you for being on our team. – Maggie Hassan's staff | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. _Before I even announced my Senate candidacy in Georgia_ , **my Democrat opponent sent out emails and text messages about my campaign.**

Will you join my team right now? While I just announced my campaign, the battle to win the Senate majority has been underway for months - and that fight runs straight through Georgia!

I need your help. Please chip in - **[even $5 will help give my campaign the momentum it needs to fend off my opponent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58278424:6VEE7L2DN:m:1:3253819041:8A4EB6F57072FF1A65C88AE26BFC6DEC:r)**

Peter, I want to be clear - the attention I've already been receiving makes it clear _the Democrats are terrified of my Senate candidacy._

body:
With the investigation into January 6 unfolding in the House, it's imperative we learn not only about what was happening at the Capitol -- but also the White House -- to uncover what truly happened that day. With the investigation into January 6 unfolding in the House, it's imperative we learn not only about what was happening at the Capitol -- but also the White House -- to uncover what truly happened that day.

As Vice Chair of the January 6 committee, Liz Cheney, said: "We must also know what happened every minute of that day in the White House—every phone call, every conversation, every meeting leading up to, during, and after the attack.” We need to hear from the people closest to Trump. Those who spoke with him throughout the attack on our Capitol. **That includes Jared Kushner and Ivanka Trump.**

As two of the closest people to Trump, Jared and Ivanka must share with the select committee what they know about the events of that day and the conversations they had with Trump in order for the committee to get to the bottom of what truly happened on January 6.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Pennsylvania could be next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=5daa1b51ff&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | Texas’s abortion ban is a brutal policy that allows and incentivizes any member of the public to sue anyone who helps a patient get an abortion after six weeks of pregnancy. It is, in fact, rare to even know if you are pregnant that early along. And there are no exceptions for rape or incest.

The abortion ban even offers a cash incentive to people who file lawsuits against someone they think is breaking the law. _The law awards at least $10,000 for every lawsuit that successfully blocks a pregnant person from getting an abortion in Texas. _

To be clear, banning safe and legal abortions does not mean that people will not terminate their pregnancies. It simply means there will be more unsafe, life-threatening procedures.

Texans need us — and attacks aren’t stopping with TX. Without a Democratic stronghold in Pennsylvania, we could be next.

✔️Make sure you are registered to vote
✔️Be sure to vote in _every_ election
✔️Visit Planned Parenthood and NARAL for actions to take to fight this unconstitutional attack on reproductive rights

Last week we learned, once again, just how much courts matter. And how much our reproductive rights are under attack.

The Supreme Court failed to take action against Texas’s extreme abortion ban, allowing it to become law. It is not an overstatement to say that this could be the end of Roe vs. Wade.

[Please help me get to Harrisburg, where I will always stand strong for reproductive choice. ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=d9a97c1b27&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

_Deja_
---
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a

clean_body: Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | | | | Texas’s abortion ban is a brutal policy that allows and incentivizes any member of the public to sue anyone who helps a patient get an abortion after six weeks of pregnancy. It is, in fact, rare to even know if you are pregnant that early along. And there are no exceptions for rape or incest. The abortion ban even offers a cash incentive to people who file lawsuits against someone they think is breaking the law. The law awards at least $10,000 for every lawsuit that successfully blocks a pregnant person from getting an abortion in Texas. To be clear, banning safe and legal abortions does not mean that people will not terminate their pregnancies. It simply means there will be more unsafe, life-threatening procedures. Texans need us — and attacks aren’t stopping with TX. Without a Democratic stronghold in Pennsylvania, we could be next. ✔️Make sure you are registered to vote ✔️Be sure to vote in every election ✔️Visit Planned Parenthood and NARAL for actions to take to fight this unconstitutional attack on reproductive rights Last week we learned, once again, just how much courts matter. And how much our reproductive rights are under attack. The Supreme Court failed to take action against Texas’s extreme abortion ban, allowing it to become law. It is not an overstatement to say that this could be the end of Roe vs. Wade. name: Stop Donald Trump
subject: Trump sees “a close race in Virginia”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
we have to be ready
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35370757/304849318/-2023814932?refcode=20210907.4_SDT_9AP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDUyMmQ2OS0wNTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5zBlAnfo-W9ALAoqus9P4t12127buIZvzggzWGlIP0=)

| | Derek,

According to the Washington Post, Donald Trump recently dropped this disturbing bombshell in an appearance on right-wing talk radio:

_**“You know how they cheat in elections. The Virginia governor’s election — you better watch it ... you have a close race in Virginia, but it’s not close if they cheat.”**_

Here's a newsflash for Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin: we didn't beat him by cheating. We defeated Trumpism by getting organized and turning out in record numbers to vote against Trumpism.

Derek, we’re just ten days from the start of early voting in Virginia. Polls show a close race, and if we’re going to stop Trumpism again, we need a historic grassroots effort to turn out voters in every corner of the Commonwealth.

**_[Please contribute anything you can afford right now and help us fund our critical voter mobilization efforts. name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan?=
subject: Introducing: Adopt a Precinct!
body:
Join our zoom training this Thursday at 6pm! | | | |
---
| | |
### Adopt a Precinct with Russo for Congress
Research has repeatedly shown that the most impactful conversations with voters come from their neighbors, friends, or trusted messengers. **By "adopting" a precinct and volunteering to talk with those voters a couple of times before Election Day,** you'll become a local campaign surrogate in your community. We'll provide training and support every step of the way!

The only way to beat our well-funded opposition is to out-organize them in every corner of the district. Not just in quantity of numbers dialed, but by having better quality conversations with voters in this district. That’s where you come in, . Join our Zoom training this Thursday to learn more!
---
|
---
|
#### We're running a campaign built by local communities, not bought by corporate PACs.
---
| Adopting a precinct allows you to take a leadership role in your neighborhood and the campaign. This is perfect for active volunteers, interns, or community organizations!
---
When you "adopt" a precinct, you are volunteering about **5 hours per week**. You'll talk to voters on your own schedule, so it's perfect for folks who can't make a weekend canvass!
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d0d8e855f1&e=400a181d5a "LEARN MORE")
---
|
---
| |
---
### Step 1: Talk to Voters
Knocking on doors is still the single best use of our volunteers’ time and passion. Field programs are especially impactful in special elections, and there is no more persuasive messengers than your own neighbor or friend. That’s why we’ll ask you and your network to knock on every targeted door in your precinct twice - once in September, and once in October. [Learn more...](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=eb63264a80&e=400a181d5a)
---
|
---
| |
---
### Step 2: Phone Follow-ups
A virtual phone back will allow you to reach the voters in your precinct who you can’t connect with at the doors. You’ll only follow up with who weren’t home, were inaccessible, or who ask for a call. [Learn more...](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2c1f065967&e=400a181d5a)
---
|
---
| |
---
### Step 3: Reminder to Vote Letters
A hand-addressed letter from a friendly neighbor reminding you to vote can have a big impact on turnout! We’ll take care of the drafting and printing, you'll just have to write a little note and drop them in the mail! [Learn more...](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c870b20cd4&e=400a181d5a)
---
|
---
| [RSVP for Zoom Info Session](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2171a17679&e=400a181d5a "RSVP for Zoom Info Session")
---
| [Invite friends or fellow activists](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9cfcf8b318&e=400a181d5a "Invite friends or fellow activists")
---

---

---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=757bc1cbb8&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=63d994bff1&e=400a181d5a)
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or a campaign event.

**Our mailing address is:**
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=0727a9ef79) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=0727a9ef79).

name: Kelsey Hamilton, Bennet for Colorado
subject: Full transparency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
It’s important we have a strong showing. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35371634/304851711/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGEyMGJkYy0wOTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b-lfJx-TqOlBbRCSVtWvuziVw-MDINFCAXYeWotp_HM=)
Listen, team, I want to be transparent with you. I’m about to ask you for money because it’s really important that we hit our fundraising goal this quarter — I hope you’ll let me explain why. Each quarter, our campaign reports every detail of our finances to the Federal Election Commission, who will then publish it in a public report. That report will be seen as an indicator of the strength of our campaign. And Republicans will pour over it looking for openings for an attack. And with Marjorie Taylor Greene holding fundraisers in Colorado, new GOP opponents jumping in, and National Republicans already targeting our state, it’s crucial that we make sure they don’t find a single weakness. Last quarter, National Republicans raked in about $28 millions to flip the Senate, so it’s critical we have a strong showing this quarter. **Right now, we’re trailing behind on this quarter’s fundraising goal but with your support today we can make up the difference. name: Dena Cranley
subject: Do you have any questions for me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
I want you to get to know me, John, and our family. | Friend, Since we began our campaign to turn Ohio blue last month, I’ve been so inspired by all the Ohioans who have come together to support us. I wish I could get to know each of you personally — to talk to you in a coffee shop or meet at a rally — but the best way for us to connect is over email! I’ll be reaching out a couple of times a month with dispatches from the campaign trail. When I first met John, I _never_ imagined myself as a politician’s wife. But over the years, I’ve been so inspired by the care John has shown for every person in our community. I _know_ that he’s the right person to lead Ohio and help our state build a comeback. **But this election isn’t about me or John. It’s about you.** I want to share with you the John I know so that you can make the _best_ decision for your family in next year’s election for governor. [**So please, if you’d like to learn more about John and our family, feel free to ask a question using this form — I’ll answer a couple in an email later this month!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35373078/304856915/-192579949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc2MzgzMS0wZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0dCh73N-fy86zE9zV9jA7GAz3vUtr-a_5f15FndaE=&emci=34763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=39763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22604289) **[ASK A QUESTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35373079/304856916/-192579949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc2MzgzMS0wZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0dCh73N-fy86zE9zV9jA7GAz3vUtr-a_5f15FndaE=&emci=34763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=39763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22604289)** I hope you and your loved ones are well, Dena [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35373080/304856917/-192579949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc2MzgzMS0wZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0dCh73N-fy86zE9zV9jA7GAz3vUtr-a_5f15FndaE=&emci=34763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=39763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=22604289) P.S. One thing that you should know about John is that he _loves_ Broadway musicals. Don’t get him started on Les Misérables.
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35373081/304856918/-1406512299?refcode=em_JC_OTH_Dena1_090721_endbutton&amount=25&refcode2=39763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc2MzgzMS0wZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0dCh73N-fy86zE9zV9jA7GAz3vUtr-a_5f15FndaE=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35373082/304856919/-1406512299?refcode=em_jc_fr_footer_link&refcode2=39763831-0e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTc2MzgzMS0wZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1A0dCh73N-fy86zE9zV9jA7GAz3vUtr-a_5f15FndaE=)

name: Jayla Gilliam
subject: fwd: This is a little awkward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Following up on our campaign van situation.
#
Hope you had a great Labor Day weekend. I just wanted to quickly follow up on Erica’s message from earlier (see below).
As you may have heard, our campaign van broke down over the weekend. Thanks to some quick-thinking auto repairmen, it’s back on the road and ready to visit more North Carolina counties (thank goodness).
But take it from a Finance Director like me: **Unexpected costs like this can really blow a hole in our campaign budget and planning.** That’s not a situation we can afford to be in — not with the huge FEC fundraising deadline coming down at the end of the month.
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, can you chip in a few bucks to help cover our van repair costs? Just click here to donate $10 or another amount, I know Erica, myself, and the whole team will really appreciate it. Thank you so much._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13812?refcode=em20210907-421&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=421%2E3698%2EibnEEA)
— Jayla
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: Erica Smith <info@email.ericaforus.com>
Date: Sun, Sep 5, 2021
Subject: This is a little awkward
Hey, it's Erica.
I feel pretty awkward about this.
But I’m writing to you from the side of Route 85 with an urgent request.
**Believe it or not, our old campaign van just broke down!**
Yes, that’s correct. I am currently sitting in a rusty campaign van on Route 85, just outside Kannapolis, North Carolina!
Some friends of mine are on their way to come rescue me. **But bringing our van into the repair shop is going to be a HUGE and UNEXPECTED campaign expense this month.**
Y'all, this van is how we get around North Carolina, criss-crossing the state to meet every voter. I really need your help getting our campaign van back up and running ASAP to continue our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_ this weekend, so I am humbly asking:
[**_Can you please rush a donation of any amount to help me pay for van repair costs? I’m in a real pinch on the side of Route 85 right now, so $10, $5, or even $3 will go a long way in helping me get out of this situation._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13812?refcode=em20210907-421&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=421%2E3698%2EibnEEA)

clean_body: Following up on our campaign van situation. Hope you had a great Labor Day weekend. I just wanted to quickly follow up on Erica’s message from earlier (see below). As you may have heard, our campaign van broke down over the weekend. Thanks to some quick-thinking auto repairmen, it’s back on the road and ready to visit more North Carolina counties (thank goodness). But take it from a Finance Director like me: Unexpected costs like this can really blow a hole in our campaign budget and planning. That’s not a situation we can afford to be in — not with the huge FEC fundraising deadline coming down at the end of the month. — Jayla \----------Forwarded message--------- From: Erica Smith <info@email.ericaforus.com> Date: Sun, Sep 5, 2021 Subject: This is a little awkward Hey, it's Erica. I feel pretty awkward about this. But I’m writing to you from the side of Route 85 with an urgent request. Believe it or not, our old campaign van just broke down! Yes, that’s correct. I am currently sitting in a rusty campaign van on Route 85, just outside Kannapolis, North Carolina! Some friends of mine are on their way to come rescue me. But bringing our van into the repair shop is going to be a HUGE and UNEXPECTED campaign expense this month. Y'all, this van is how we get around North Carolina, criss-crossing the state to meet every voter. I really need your help getting our campaign van back up and running ASAP to continue our 100 Counties, 100 Days Tour this weekend, so I am humbly asking: Thank you SO MUCH for your support! — Erica ❤️ P.S. Here’s what the van used to look like when it was in tip-top shape. Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35374297/304861232/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQyNDdjYy0xMjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTwN8IXjCxF4_5jgKPwAdT6xQviqZxt7xYPoRoHP-lM=&emci=a5a3bd8b-1110-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e34247cc-1210-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10950315)

I want to be very clear about something.

A person should _always_ , without exception, have the freedom to control intimate decisions about their own body **without** the interference of government — including deciding whether or not they want to carry a pregnancy to term.

**I have always and will always stand by this. And I have always and will always be part of the _party_ that unequivocally supports this choice.**

For fifty years, Roe v. Wade enshrined in law the right to choose. Now, a new Texas law has made abortion **virtually illegal** in the state. Rather than striking it down for violating Roe, the Supreme Court has _looked the other way_.

This new jurisprudence is **an unacceptable violation of the bodily autonomy of people who can get pregnant.**

As the people's attorney and a lifelong Democrat, I will defend the right to choose no matter what.

[**Will you chip into my campaign now to help ensure that I can defend abortion rights as AG?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35374299/304861233/2127152568?refcode=X_090721_Choice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQyNDdjYy0xMjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTwN8IXjCxF4_5jgKPwAdT6xQviqZxt7xYPoRoHP-lM=)

Thank you!

\-- _Diego_ | **Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35374300/304861234/2127152568?refcode=X_090721_Choice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzQyNDdjYy0xMjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QTwN8IXjCxF4_5jgKPwAdT6xQviqZxt7xYPoRoHP-lM=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Unforgiveable & unacceptable!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Leave no American behind |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b2d5bd0f7e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

In my decades in the U.S. Army, there was one rule we never forgot:

_Leave no soldier behind._

Joe Biden forgot that rule. And now he must pay- by being impeached and removed.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=67facf4354&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who will follow Biden to the unemployment lines!**

Do you remember? Not that long ago?

Do you remember Biden's empty promises of not leaving Americans behind? It's a promise I know well, having lived it for decades of my life.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=34e596bc79&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _President Biden appears to have broken his promise to stay in Afghanistan until every American is evacuated.

Marine Corps Gen. Kenneth F. McKenzie Jr. announced Monday evening that the last of the U.S. troops stationed at the Kabul airport had left, completing the military’s drawdown in the country, even though hundreds of Americans likely remain.

McKenzie, commander of U.S. Central Command, said some American citizens who wanted to leave Afghanistan remained in the country. _

So what happened here? Hundreds or thousands of Americans- many trying, in vain, to get to the airport and to freedom- were abandoned to torture, violence, and hostage taking by a thuggish terrorist regime.

We abandoned them. Or more accurately, JOE BIDEN ABANDONED THEM.

Many will not make it out alive. Many will be caught and tortured and ransomed.

And it will all be Biden's fault, and his alone.

**_Biden left Americans behind on the battlefield. Now it's time to leave Biden behind._**
---
|
---
| **Biden is out of his league, and most likely mentally compromised. He callously left and allowed hundreds, and likely thousands, of Americans to die. **

We must impeach Biden. The country demands it. Yet for some reason, party leaders- Swampers on BOTH sides of the aisle- are pushing back on impeaching him!

_Speaking at an event in Kentucky on Wednesday, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell shut down the notion that President Joe Biden would be impeached anytime soon.

"Well, look, the president's not going to be removed from office," McConnell replied when asked whether Biden's behavior was impeachable._

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. What he did cost many American lives, and for NO GOOD REASON!

_I'm not a Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not._

What Biden has done is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool!

We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ed25475cf3&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a2f1ccda63&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever in 2020. It's a red-trending area in a red-trending state! We can win it in 2022.

No more "nice guy" politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=aa1bba3d9e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=720aafb680&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9b8588c5ca&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2c6ee8cf95&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---

clean_body: Leave no American behind | | | | Hi Peter, In my decades in the U.S. Army, there was one rule we never forgot: Leave no soldier behind. Joe Biden forgot that rule. And now he must pay- by being impeached and removed. My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet , Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who will follow Biden to the unemployment lines! Do you remember? Not that long ago? Do you remember Biden's empty promises of not leaving Americans behind? It's a promise I know well, having lived it for decades of my life. | | President Biden appears to have broken his promise to stay in Afghanistan until every American is evacuated. Marine Corps Gen. Kenneth F. McKenzie Jr. announced Monday evening that the last of the U.S. troops stationed at the Kabul airport had left, completing the military’s drawdown in the country, even though hundreds of Americans likely remain. McKenzie, commander of U.S. Central Command, said some American citizens who wanted to leave Afghanistan remained in the country. So what happened here? Hundreds or thousands of Americans- many trying, in vain, to get to the airport and to freedom- were abandoned to torture, violence, and hostage taking by a thuggish terrorist regime. We abandoned them. Or more accurately, JOE BIDEN ABANDONED THEM. Many will not make it out alive. Many will be caught and tortured and ransomed. And it will all be Biden's fault, and his alone. Biden left Americans behind on the battlefield. Now it's time to leave Biden behind. | | Biden is out of his league, and most likely mentally compromised. He callously left and allowed hundreds, and likely thousands, of Americans to die. We must impeach Biden. The country demands it. Yet for some reason, party leaders- Swampers on BOTH sides of the aisle- are pushing back on impeaching him! Speaking at an event in Kentucky on Wednesday, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell shut down the notion that President Joe Biden would be impeached anytime soon. "Well, look, the president's not going to be removed from office," McConnell replied when asked whether Biden's behavior was impeachable. Biden's incompetence will go down in history. What he did cost many American lives, and for NO GOOD REASON! I'm not a Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not. What Biden has done is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool! We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! ? I got more votes here than any Republican ever in 2020. It's a red-trending area in a red-trending state! We can win it in 2022. No more "nice guy" politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

We know we email you a lot, Peter. That’s because we rely on the support of Grassroots Republicans like you to sustain our efforts! The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us, and we can’t afford to let them win. The best way you can help is [1] by subscribing to our emails and text messages and [2] by chipping in a few dollars as often as you can. We appreciate you!
Text JOIN to 21011 to receive mobile alerts and help the NCGOP! Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&data rates may apply. Terms and Conditions at [21011-info.com](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=r6rcTiCaq6j7Lcgrzw4K17041lLwyHYaLS1Xg9Z7-WE&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=231092647144811275_p&n=11).

clean_body: re: Demand Joe Biden’s Resignation | Hey, Peter -- We wanted to follow up and make sure that you saw this important NCGOP Memo from just before the holiday weekend. It’s so very important that you read it and respond right away. Thanks, NCGOP HQ TO: Peter Willis FROM: NCGOP HQ RE: President Biden Must Resign Can you believe Joe Biden, Peter? In fact, “plan” may be an overstatement, because it implies that he had a plan in the first place. The fact is that everything Joe Biden has promised about Afghanistan has been either wrong or a lie. He’s not at all in control of the situation, and he never has been. | | Joe Biden is so weak that he makes Jimmy Carter look like Ronald Reagan. He’s AWFUL!! Sleepy Joe has let us down, Peter -- and now he’s trying to gaslight the public with lies and misdirection. It’s time for Republican Patriots like you to stand up and say ENOUGH! Thank you. \-- North Carolina Republican Party

clean_body: The attention I've already been receiving make it clear the Democrats are terrified of my Senate candidacy. | The left is scared, Fellow Conservative. Before I even announced my Senate candidacy in Georgia , my Democrat opponent sent out emails and text messages about my campaign. Fellow Conservative, with the fight already starting, Will you join my team right now? While I just announced my campaign, the battle to win the Senate majority has been underway for months - and that fight runs straight through Georgia! I need your help. Please chip in - Fellow Conservative, I want to be clear - the attention I've already been receiving makes it clear the Democrats are terrified of my Senate candidacy. They know I will fight for YOU and the American Dream. And this makes me a threat. Sincerely, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Fellow American - I hope you read this email all the way through, because I may soon not be allowed to send communications like this.

We all know that the media and Big Tech serve the interests of the Left and silence any information that doesn’t align with their views. Now, they’re targeting me.

Last week, I posted a government-sourced image (see below) detailing how the Biden administration left billions of dollars worth of equipment behind in Afghanistan for the Taliban’s taking.

Facebook quickly put a disclaimer on the post, which quibbles over the dollar figures, citing “one expert” who is unnamed. They’re splitting hairs over small details in an attempt to mislead the public into thinking the post is misinformation.

Make no mistake about it: Big Tech is actively trying to skew facts and censor information that is damaging to Democrats.

Derek- Yesterday was Labor Day and we have our brothers, sisters, and siblings in the Labor movement to thank for the holiday, for weekends, for 8 hour work days, and so many more practices in the workplace. We as Democrats believe in helping out our workforce by giving them a living wage, safe work conditions, and full benefits. The fastest way to achieve this goal is to let our workers unionize by passing the Protect the Right to Organize Act. We owe it to these workers to deliver. If you agree, send a letter to Senator Warner today!

clean_body: | | Derek- Yesterday was Labor Day and we have our brothers, sisters, and siblings in the Labor movement to thank for the holiday, for weekends, for 8 hour work days, and so many more practices in the workplace. We as Democrats believe in helping out our workforce by giving them a living wage, safe work conditions, and full benefits. The fastest way to achieve this goal is to let our workers unionize by passing the Protect the Right to Organize Act. We owe it to these workers to deliver. If you agree, send a letter to Senator Warner today! | Senator Warner has indicated that he will vote in favor of it if it comes to that. However, our ask remains the same: Voting is great and we appreciate the support. But actions speak louder than words and signatures are more powerful than promises. New polling states that 65% of Virginia voters support the PRO Act and yet our Senator Mark Warner is one of 3 Democratic Senators NOT supporting the PRO Act. He is the ONLY Federal Elected Official from Virginia not voting for the PRO act as well. If you don't live in Virginia, ask your Senators to lobby Senators Warner, Kelly, and Sinema for their signatures. The U.S. House of Representatives passed the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act last year, but anti-worker legislators in the Senate blocked it. Undeterred, working people fought to elect pro-worker lawmakers to the Senate, House and White House. And we won. Stronger unions mean higher wages, safer working conditions and dignity for all people who work. The PRO Act is our first step to get there. In Solidarity, KTBBH Team | | KTBBH takes its initials from the late great Henry Howell who said he would "Keep the Big Boys Honest." Team, Last month, Governor Kim Reynolds stripped power away from Iowa’s schools when she banned mask requirements statewide. This decision takes local control away from our communities who know what’s best for their schools and students. **Now, the U.S. Department of Education Office of Civil Rights is investigating the state of Iowa for banning masks in schools, because it puts children with disabilities and underlying medical conditions at greater risk of COVID-19.** Not only did Governor Reynolds ban masks, she also returned $95 million in federal funds meant for COVID-19 mitigation in Iowa schools. According to research by North Carolina State University, **without any COVID mitigation, 75-95% of vulnerable K-12 students may get infected in the first 90 days they’re back in school.** We have seen schools across Iowa that have been unable to start on time due to too many teachers contracting COVID or having to quarantine. As the father of two young girls who are back in school, the husband of a public school teacher, and the ranking member of the Education Committee in the Iowa House of Representatives, I’m deeply concerned and troubled by Gov. Reynolds’ power-grab and refusal to help ensure that our students can stay in school safely during this pandemic. **[Simply put, Gov. Reynolds is putting politics before our children. It’s not right, and Iowans deserve better. If you agree, help me take on Gov. Reynolds at the ballot box next year and give our state a leader who will put our students, families, and communities first.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35376634/304871929/975127612?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210907investigation_rs_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGEyOTU2YS0xYTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcGCuRBbH2Yab55Bh6Js1wfB0StTM9jBCUrukCxxVZM=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

As the father of two young girls who are back in school, the husband of a public school teacher, and the ranking member of the Education Committee in the Iowa House of Representatives, I’m deeply concerned and troubled by Gov. Reynolds’ power-grab and refusal to help ensure that our students can stay in school safely during this pandemic. = ** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me on this crucial issue impacting so many Iowans, Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. body:
| | | We're absolutely outraged:

**FIRST:** Republicans incited the deadly January 6th insurrection to overturn the 2020 election.

**AND THEN:** After that failed, they introduced 400+ laws to restrict our right to vote all across the country.

**SO NOW:** Must-win, Republican-led states like Georgia, Texas, and Florida are passing these restrictive voting laws as we speak --_all to sabotage our Democrats! _

**[To DEFEAT Republicans and SAVE our democracy, we need to elect pro-voting House Democrats who will fight for our rights. But with Republicans SHATTERING fundraising records left and right, we need your help and your $3 to keep up the pace and protect our House Majority. So please, can you chip in before midnight and join the fight to defend our House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZG6A-)
---

**Let 's be clear**. In a healthy democracy, we the people should be able to answer yes to the following voting rights questions:

_**\-- Can you register to vote?
\-- Can you cast a ballot?
\-- Does your ballot get counted?**_

But right now Republicans are DEEPLY invested in nationwide efforts to gut these and other voting rights.

We have the power to stop attacks on our voting rights and hand Republicans a STUNNING defeat -- _**but not if we let Republicans continue outraising us in the fight to control the House.**_

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of September 6th: Protests, recalls, education, & call the Senate!
body:
| |
---
This week, there are lots of things to do locally, and nationally, there are still three messages we must keep hammering in the Senate, if we hope to stop the Democrats from passing their bills to increase election fraud and spend $3.5 trillion on radical, left-wing priorities.

**Action items for this week include:**
* Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22
* Local: Start researching recall laws in your state using Ballotpedia
* Local: Voter Registration Month & Day and Constitution Day
* Local: Attend a school board meeting
* National: Continue to send 3 messages to your Senators
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Last week, we recapped our first round of protests against unscientific medical mandates. Together, we sent a clear message to petty tyrants across the nation. We do not consent and we will not comply with any more COVID mandates. No forced masking. No forced vaccines. No lockdowns. No more medical mandates, period. We made it clear that we are done.

And last week, we also saw what happens when people fail to push back against petty tyrants' slow encroachment upon their liberty. [Conor Friedersdorf explains at the Atlantic how Australia Traded Away Too Much Liberty.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlYXRsYW50aWMuY29tL2lkZWFzL2FyY2hpdmUvMjAyMS8wOS9wYW5kZW1pYy1hdXN0cmFsaWEtc3RpbGwtbGliZXJhbC1kZW1vY3JhY3kvNjE5OTQwLz9taWQ9NDQyOTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mUgrRtX5d8TCc28m8EAfGQ)
|
---
**Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22
**
**There will be another round of Just Say No to unAmerican medical mandates protests on Wednesday, September 22nd, and[you can start signing up today!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ZiZ6-idw48QtNC6MfjS0Pw) **The earlier you sign up and let us know the details, the sooner we can promote it, to help you get more attendees.

FireBrand Action, Moms for America, and Turning Point USA are also coordinating anti-mandate protests on 9/22, so there should be a great showing of patriotism that day! If you aren’t able to organize one on 9/22, but instead can hold it on the following Saturday, 9/25, that’s fine too. Holding it within the same week is helpful for numbers and momentum.

[We are continuing to update our How-to Guide.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5uZXQvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy1ob3d0by1ndWlkZT9taWQ9NDQyOTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=uAN6c_HoPLqxKridE1z5GA) You will want to do download it again as the next day of action approaches.
|
---
On Monday, August 30th, the Biden Administration completed their botched withdraw from Afghanistan leaving behind a full arsenal for the Taliban and abandoning hundreds of Americans behind enemy lines.

This complete and total disaster made one thing abundantly clear: [Joe Biden is a failed President.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjEvMDgvMTkvYWZnaGFuLWRlYmFjbGUtaGFzLWV4cG9zZWQtam9lLWJpZGVuLWFzLWEtZmFpbGVkLXByZXNpZGVudC8_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=DVdCeHjRcagCfWuLk7F_SA)
|
---
**Local: National Voter Registration Month & Day and Constitution Day
**
**Voter Registration**
September is [National Voter Registration Month](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmFzcy5vcmcvaW5pdGlhdGl2ZXMvbmF0aW9uYWwtdm90ZXItcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uLW1vbnRoP21pZD00NDI5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=HqyK4tmkYfHa-Lhsxh9Kvw) and [National Voter Registration Day](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uYXRpb25hbHZvdGVycmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uZGF5Lm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Q2THzd1J7UTEQ5tPQSNRKQ) is September 28th. The links will take you to websites with resources like, how to register people to vote, state laws, and more.

Left-wing groups have traditionally been all over registering voters, but this is something that conservatives should be doing as well. Lefties often try to register people they believe will vote left. So, where should you register voters? Good places to register voters are gun shows, conservative churches, state fairs, rodeos, homeschool meet ups, Christian schools, etc.

Don’t let the left win this numbers game. Look at the websites above, use their resources, and register some conservatives to vote!

**Constitution Day**
September 17 is designated as Constitution Day and Citizenship Day to commemorate the signing of the U.S. Constitution in Philadelphia on September 17, 1787.

That’s only a couple of weeks away! Constitution Week goes from 9/17 – 9/23. Make sure you are ready for it in your family, and in your school (and even in your workplace!). If you want to make sure your school recognizes Constitution Day, you likely need to talk to them as soon as possible. See the links below for resources to help you celebrate our Constitution!
* [Ideas for creating a community event to celebrate your own Constitution Week](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uY2NzLm5ldC9ibG9ncy9hcnRpY2xlcy9hcmUteW91LWNlbGVicmF0aW5nLWNvbnN0aXR1dGlvbi13ZWVrP21pZD00NDI5MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=JsJujXYQgkr1Bh2oDdc4tA)
* [Games and activities for kids K-12](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2NvbnN0aXR1dGlvbndlZWt1c2EuY29tL3Jlc291cmNlcy9nYW1lcy1hY3Rpdml0aWVzLz9taWQ9NDQyOTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XkKdQnz5D9C0Eh5KMZbksQ)
* [More information about Constitution Week from Daughters of the Revolution](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFyLm9yZy9uYXRpb25hbC1zb2NpZXR5L2VkdWNhdGlvbi9jb25zdGl0dXRpb24td2Vlaz9taWQ9NDQyOTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=PNhXl6hSmCLScykgIiW0Fg)
* [Order a free pocket Constitution from Hillsdale College](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cDovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZnJlZS1wb2NrZXQtY29uc3RpdHV0aW9uLz9taWQ9NDQyOTImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=YT_dw3pmbsCqgODGIuQDfw)

There are a ton of resources and lesson plans available online, so if you’d like more than what we’ve provided here, simply search for Constitution Day + activities or lessons. Speak to your school, work, etc. and try to get something going!
|
---
After Joe Biden's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan, where he abandoned American citizens behind enemy lines and cost the lives of 13 brave service members, along with countless Afghans, the American people had a clear message for Joe Biden:

“Resign.”

In the latest Rasmussen Reports survey, a majority of respondents said they wanted Biden to resign over his Afghanistan withdrawal failure. [Paul Bedard at the Washington Examiner has the story](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS93YXNoaW5ndG9uLXNlY3JldHMvcmVzaWduLW5vdy01Mi13YW50LWJpZGVuLW91dC1idXQtZmVhci13b3JzZS11bmRlci1oYXJyaXM_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=m6QbtlWaEsYy4uqFKLAbiA)
|
---
**National: Continue to send 3 messages to your Senators
**
While it is frustrating to keep calling politicians, and it doesn’t always seem to work, it’s still necessary and helpful. And the three messages we gave the Senate last week are the ones we need to keep sending them. We need to keep the pressure up until the danger has been eliminated.

The three messages are:
* **Vote no on H.R. 4, a.k.a. the “Pelosi Power Grab Act.”** _([Read this article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDIxLzA4LzI2L2hvdXNlLWRlbW9jcmF0cy1wYXNzLWJpbGwtdG8tc3RlYWwtZWxlY3Rpb25zLXRoZS1vbGQtZmFzaGlvbmVkLXdheS8_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=D2oDYoUOUAw8gK5xK2onGA) by Cleta Mitchell to learn more about H.R. 4, and share [this graphic](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wYnMudHdpbWcuY29tL21lZGlhL0U5dVRMOXFWa0FJVGVNSi5qcGc_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ldvaXOlXndgJ1enKrlSwBw)[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjUwLWQyMzI1ZTk1YTcyNjRlMWJiYzM0YmJjOTdiODlkNDZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wYnMudHdpbWcuY29tL21lZGlhL0U5dVRMOXFWa0FJVGVNSi5qcGc_bWlkPTQ0MjkyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-SmesRmZBxOGTzi7-ntp7A) if you haven’t already.)_
* **Vote no on the $3.5 trillion reckless spending bill.**
* **Hold the White House and military leadership accountable for Afghanistan by exercising congressional oversight.**

If you live in WV, AZ, MT, NH, or GA, it is of the utmost importance that you call your Senators, especially Sen.
