clean_body: | | This week, there are lots of things to do locally, and nationally, there are still three messages we must keep hammering in the Senate, if we hope to stop the Democrats from passing their bills to increase election fraud and spend $3.5 trillion on radical, left-wing priorities. Action items for this week include: Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22 Local: Start researching recall laws in your state using Ballotpedia Local: Voter Registration Month & Day and Constitution Day Local: Attend a school board meeting National: Continue to send 3 messages to your Senators Reminders and other sign up forms See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Last week, we recapped our first round of protests against unscientific medical mandates. Together, we sent a clear message to petty tyrants across the nation. We do not consent and we will not comply with any more COVID mandates. No forced masking. No forced vaccines. No lockdowns. No more medical mandates, period. We made it clear that we are done. And last week, we also saw what happens when people fail to push back against petty tyrants' slow encroachment upon their liberty. | Local: Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest on 9/22 There will be another round of Just Say No to unAmerican medical mandates protests on Wednesday, September 22nd, and The earlier you sign up and let us know the details, the sooner we can promote it, to help you get more attendees. FireBrand Action, Moms for America, and Turning Point USA are also coordinating anti-mandate protests on 9/22, so there should be a great showing of patriotism that day! If you aren’t able to organize one on 9/22, but instead can hold it on the following Saturday, 9/25, that’s fine too. Holding it within the same week is helpful for numbers and momentum. You will want to do download it again as the next day of action approaches. | On Monday, August 30th, the Biden Administration completed their botched withdraw from Afghanistan leaving behind a full arsenal for the Taliban and abandoning hundreds of Americans behind enemy lines. This complete and total disaster made one thing abundantly clear: | Local: National Voter Registration Month & Day and Constitution Day Voter Registration September is and is September 28th. The links will take you to websites with resources like, how to register people to vote, state laws, and more. Left-wing groups have traditionally been all over registering voters, but this is something that conservatives should be doing as well. Lefties often try to register people they believe will vote left. So, where should you register voters? Good places to register voters are gun shows, conservative churches, state fairs, rodeos, homeschool meet ups, Christian schools, etc. Don’t let the left win this numbers game. Look at the websites above, use their resources, and register some conservatives to vote! Constitution Day September 17 is designated as Constitution Day and Citizenship Day to commemorate the signing of the U.S. Constitution in Philadelphia on September 17, 1787. That’s only a couple of weeks away! Constitution Week goes from 9/17 – 9/23. Make sure you are ready for it in your family, and in your school (and even in your workplace!). If you want to make sure your school recognizes Constitution Day, you likely need to talk to them as soon as possible. See the links below for resources to help you celebrate our Constitution! There are a ton of resources and lesson plans available online, so if you’d like more than what we’ve provided here, simply search for Constitution Day + activities or lessons. Speak to your school, work, etc. and try to get something going! | After Joe Biden's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan, where he abandoned American citizens behind enemy lines and cost the lives of 13 brave service members, along with countless Afghans, the American people had a clear message for Joe Biden: “Resign.” In the latest Rasmussen Reports survey, a majority of respondents said they wanted Biden to resign over his Afghanistan withdrawal failure. | National: Continue to send 3 messages to your Senators While it is frustrating to keep calling politicians, and it doesn’t always seem to work, it’s still necessary and helpful. And the three messages we gave the Senate last week are the ones we need to keep sending them. We need to keep the pressure up until the danger has been eliminated. The three messages are: Vote no on H.R. 4, a.k.a. the “Pelosi Power Grab Act.” ( by Cleta Mitchell to learn more about H.R. 4, and share if you haven’t already.) Vote no on the $3.5 trillion reckless spending bill. Hold the White House and military leadership accountable for Afghanistan by exercising congressional oversight. body:
Public Policy Polling just released a new poll our primary
#

Public Policy Polling just released a new poll of our primary, and it shows Cheri with a clear lead!
Not only that, but once voters learned more about the candidates, Cheri soared to a 30-point lead with over half of likely voters saying they’d vote for Cheri.
Here’s what Public Policy Polling’s analysis said about it: **“After hearing more about each candidate’s background and beliefs, Beasley leads Jackson by a 30-point margin (53-23), with just 23% still undecided.”**
This is fantastic news, and we need to capitalize on this momentum right away.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us organize and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35377604/304874538/1741212721?refcode2=95f23c29-1e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210907-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYyM2MyOS0xZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYK5_Oh_uS4_JG4Xg6ewuFCWAQQCv8P2R0dOQ11GLr0=)

This poll shows what we’ve known from the start: Cheri has the largest base of support of any Democrat and a winning message that can push us to victory.
Cheri has the experience it takes not just to flip this Senate seat but to deliver meaningful progress for our families on health care, education, climate change, a living wage and so much more.
Now we need to get to work to make sure every North Carolina voter knows what Cheri stands for and that she will fight for all of us.
[**Please make a $3 donation right now to help us build on our lead, win this race and send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate. We cannot do this without grassroots support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35377606/304874540/1741212721?refcode2=95f23c29-1e10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210907-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYyM2MyOS0xZTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYK5_Oh_uS4_JG4Xg6ewuFCWAQQCv8P2R0dOQ11GLr0=)

If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider = today to help us make history.

subject: California Republicans Need Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
California Republicans need our help removing the worst Governor in America. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470810?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=153f03822e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

California needs our help to remove the worst Governor in America - Gavin Newsom. California, one of the most liberal states in the nation, has the opportunity to remove Governor Gavin Newsom in a recall election on September 14. Polls are close and they need every bit of help they can get.

[Please sign up to make calls into California and they will set you up with their online voter contact tool - Campaign Sidekick.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efd8d5d6b6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [Recall Newsom: Make Calls into California](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7df58a4044&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Recall Newsom: Make Calls into California")
---
| If we don't recall California Governor Gavin Newsom, his failed policies could spread to other states. [Don't let that happen and get involved TODAY.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a2bf6db9cd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [Volunteer to Recall Newsom](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=de6cf4cb3d&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Volunteer to Recall Newsom")
---
| California has already given us Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Vice President Kamala Harris. Gavin Newsom has national ambitions as well. Let's help California Republicans recall Governor Newsom.
---
|
---
| Thank you!

The Indiana Republican Party

name: Alek
subject: Six years ago, a terrorist tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
As a soldier, I was trained to take out terrorist threats -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I am in the world. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IApS9g-G4ykoFUJS3mkUjD5_cL17jQ_N81KTAgGzltt7oaoW3SM-728IDhXvfSBPqAqavxXVsqHNjvyJ1FlnjvWVx-WJsXr55r6oWV1glme0qpl9qbgr2ypKJHAucYjbOJ-1d6MZXNgdDJ9bx_w5l0RugPpuyDjq4QgVHhsVomQczD-yXu79XaxxrFcOaQrE49YHtEzXpFL2sxpS-biqqhWQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IAQs9WOxvqL8_8AeMfVQETnQeb4UtJynyYTOBqaJvxjW51UWECZhMCCm-VORrQOduRiKeBcAFSHolYKMR4BP8F9Dn35KH74BFDQA2f_dcRHT6FqCtgMSyRD_ZyijpVcb-FyWylOB35uJv_eiXmW2kR0w5aWDY4um_mQSJ3XDTy6y6Tg9LY80fOq3s-ErHZHoRuwzTGKkmVfBAcBJY4phP76g%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IA94BFtOWd0n3joiHcORPbuI2QSf1WGWa8tA8seI_e6uvsPjqd3J2li9NEBmWU6LcCQ2FqjRGdE0HEoizyFHehPsiwUsd1z6ef9akX5vlgg99JuctTla1mUgozrp_7QtccoMJghXqWBLnmNhg-uvyp3I6Y1UQtMbYuKEdpujec3mRKx8EY_7B_fwlyI9ZUa_K09KlJsRINbToeCMS5aOkKdw%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IAMpULk-PkJE6bTf9u2MkHg15SKbi_Fb_skoCM17R9tStqFSQ31JpC7E8sXtFeQiUDwbvqjmxe-mrWRYZOoQNKWkems--dgmxyFug7IYMswnn2124Fr0rd0GtRqZyOI7OPMzppyYtZAfuqBPac3h94HTLRBOgRTD1K7UR3MlJKlAt01Skp4GjvPJlZeKu8ilHaDTU6qX1VnIp8OWkmqY6diw%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IA-E1fLCnu_sdQ23pi14sY2etLaE9QQFJbCn_uFN7SzQKdjkElRLLtTpOhvMDCSRzT-mjqXFDxYa6rCnSMJIuJ_IMq74qK7trKURsoyiuxU-Mi_nXqLXfOvsv5otZwpE-KPe9I9tc6CmQVU2-DdRUwWwnc-mhDC4nXaE57XdRY9PqNubgPF_x-AOZF1Sqmc1xbAOenQSziEmhbS6p5lyEfUQ%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IAxqF_0AMbLWePzSva26LjRxMhR2Rquy_uuTnrEuEUKgPEzA2-MdddMCSOkCv0jz1P3PZLK2mOy3CMnJ4Nr5BQsvpW8ixX58oqQKX53zxtgyo3rgibAiXppivbAY2Ev-2HEUJPX-zkU6bMZK_WU1_aqo96qa1LXh_lAJz7IJAFQXRCY9FGAZ7ij4ooUaitEzNf5zvFjfmJsGr1npSQxxkugA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IA_2PqsI3LPQGPSTBf3J7xGo_XGi-6spRKB9uVO_5o-u4a-TvJXVibqeTS8zm_89L32rD0J1RPBWEx1Qmc1ec8IO6caHI_JA4q1Ses6W0OeSFHaOImGiW8i_rz1g79EtyTqJ2TiIyvymZS-CfoqnBqIjhGXQRCOUikSVtrpB6GC4MZocsqChu4cRFKgYFprE3Zb6Uc0FgPDlrWBIfcqkT6DA%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. [**To support Alek’s campaign chip in $5 or more today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=837ffa94b66e4cb6a61ca14a8b8e2db2&_e=5q9OLPHGhXnB7QnulCl7oZCgRha55grZ099WxEOHeulQue0oEQ4Lh8fJli7EQjx_-tocmY1eEaE6VLuv6ggdGdKPebtXj8W7LtqZhwxM6qdYsm_1z7HwexhG4udTVbAeRFXobyKG0syZ_hBgi5VhpCskV6KwLt5ZzGRDFLsvsPFJgzHQ8t82v27MVKNg6WE1qIp15f8VRg_qr87RiEynRWp-92b1B_he8vN1ZS11EVdfbPXHPDrxJW--yC2kS3IARTBrpzlIupgihIgM2E9TL_gEPwXYeLGhjPhoYYLZ4MowiUKjhXvz8_b66O2bYlcQkgXFNYe2R6FoM7iGtgXN5BRIFFouhsUVIRz56UAJWFMhFS5Jwo780QtGD8I9X75qIEg7iWy68UIhOGl2VckY4vhQqwHeuQ0vfW6KEXyU0lbwC1zYSQXxZHfmGgb3A6gk4jiIzGGHhxdShEa8uPC0Hw%3D%3D)

clean_body: As a soldier, I was trained to take out terrorist threats -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I am in the world. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

This is critical as Republicans continue their attacks on voting rights across the country. They know, as we do, that **when every eligible voter is able to cast a ballot, Democrats win.**
The math here is simple, team. Protecting voting rights matters to the vast majority of voters and Susie is ready to work alongside Democrats in Congress to get it done!

clean_body: Protecting voting rights is popular! | | Protecting the right to vote is popular, team! FIRST: Voters turned out in record numbers to elect Democrats across the country. THEN: Republicans all over the country began to pass voter suppression laws, disproportionately impacting minority voters. NOW: Folks in Nevada and across the country are done sitting on the sidelines and are ready to support voting rights legislation! | | | This new poll — which surveyed Nevadans! — shows that 64% of voters are in favor of the voting rights bill proposed by Democrats in Congress. This is critical as Republicans continue their attacks on voting rights across the country. They know, as we do, that when every eligible voter is able to cast a ballot, Democrats win. The math here is simple, team. Protecting voting rights matters to the vast majority of voters and Susie is ready to work alongside Democrats in Congress to get it done! I want to know who stood with me during this crucial time. I 've asked to see a list of EVERY Patriot who steps up to help us reach our $1,000,000 goal. I hope I see your name. Thank you, Donald J. The Texas law outlaws abortions after six weeks of pregnancy with almost no exceptions, and it deputizes citizen patrols to intervene in one of the most personal health choices someone can make.
Under this law, any private citizen can sue doctors who perform abortions or individuals who provide any type of assistance to someone seeking an abortion -- such as offering a ride to a clinic or supplying monetary support.
**Let’s be clear: When Cawthorn calls for other states to follow Texas’s lead, he is calling for bounty-hunting “citizen patrols” across the country. This is a direct threat to people’s health and safety.**
[**Will you donate $25 to make sure he doesn’t win a second term as Western North Carolina’s Congressman? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35379961/304881978/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210907_FR_TexasAbortion_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDIwYWMxZi0yNjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFzwYmk0pTdgd63pIiux_xGEtwRv3KDQvV4N2ybIewg=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35379962/304881979/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210907_FR_TexasAbortion_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDIwYWMxZi0yNjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFzwYmk0pTdgd63pIiux_xGEtwRv3KDQvV4N2ybIewg=)

The decision to have an abortion is a deeply personal and often painful one. We need elected officials and judges who respect a person’s right to make decisions about their own body. I will be a vote and a voice in Congress to codify the right to choose in federal law.
In solidarity,
Jasmine

name: Team Sarah
subject: Recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Every chance he gets, Ron Johnson finds a new way to motivate us to take him down. Here are just some of his most recent blunders:
* Suggesting COVID-19 is not a deadly virus;
* Pushing horse drugs despite federal warnings;
* Undermining vaccination efforts with conspiracies;
* Admitting Trump lost the election after pushing the Big Lie;
* Getting caught enriching himself and his campaign donors;
* And that's just off the top of our heads!

Now here’s what his Democratic challenger Sarah Godlewski is up to:
* Driving across Wisconsin talking to voters about their concerns;
* Pushing for policies that put workers and families first;
* Following the science and listening to the experts on COVID-19;
* Working with Governor Evers to help struggling Wisconsinites;

name: Team Padilla
subject: One week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Building on the progress we’ve made here in California requires stopping this Republican Recall attempt and keeping Governor Newsom in office.
#

**One week.**
That’s all the time we have left to organize and get out the vote to ensure that as many people as possible vote NO on the Republican Recall of Governor Newsom.
We’ll explain more about why it’s so important to stop the recall in a minute, but if you’re ready to donate now, please use this link to split a contribution between our campaign and the campaign to defeat the Republican recall attempt here in California:
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Stop-The-Recall**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-recall-split?refcode=em210907-1-15&t=1&refcode2=289_159979_XHBMqb&akid=289%2E159979%2EXHBMqb)
The truth is, if Governor Newsom is recalled, he will most likely be replaced by an anti-mask, anti-vax, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump supporter. That poses a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and across the country.
On _every_ issue — from the pandemic to climate change to immigration and beyond — building on the progress we’ve made here in California requires stopping this Republican Recall attempt and keeping Governor Newsom in office.
But with just a week to go, the polls show this is a tight race. We need to do everything we can to get as many NO voters as possible to turn in their ballots ahead of next week’s deadline.
**So we are asking for your support to help Gavin Newsom defeat the Republican Recall and to keep California blue:**
[**Please split a contribution — of whatever amount you can afford — to help us organize to defeat the Republican Recall and to keep California blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-recall-split?refcode=em210907-1-15&t=2&refcode2=289_159979_XHBMqb&akid=289%2E159979%2EXHBMqb)
Thank you,
Team Padilla
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-recall-split?refcode=em210907-1-15&t=3&refcode2=289_159979_XHBMqb&akid=289%2E159979%2EXHBMqb)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=289%2E159979%2EXHBMqb)

We’ll explain more about why it’s so important to stop the recall in a minute, but if you’re ready to donate now, please use this link to split a contribution between our campaign and the campaign to defeat the Republican recall attempt here in California: The truth is, if Governor Newsom is recalled, he will most likely be replaced by an anti-mask, anti-vax, and anti-immigrant far-right Trump supporter. That poses a real threat to the progress we’ve made here in California and across the country. On every issue — from the pandemic to climate change to immigration and beyond — building on the progress we’ve made here in California requires stopping this Republican Recall attempt and keeping Governor Newsom in office. But with just a week to go, the polls show this is a tight race. We need to do everything we can to get as many NO voters as possible to turn in their ballots ahead of next week’s deadline. So we are asking for your support to help Gavin Newsom defeat the Republican Recall and to keep California blue: Thank you, Team Padilla Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. name: Donna Imam
subject: Joe Manchin
body:
I'll be more than a rubber stamp, I'll be a champion for working families in Congress. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35381744/304887606/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA1MGRjYi0yYjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qVC6gx5PkZL_lfWKtVtfPzjARBAyDIeR_WZsfnFF34=)
Friend,

I hope you enjoyed Labor Day weekend. It's important to recognize that working Americans create all the wealth in our country.

Last week, Senator Joe Manchin wrote an op-ed detailing why he _won't_ support the $3.5 trillion dollar reconciliation package. This is devastating for working families that desperately need what this bill delivers: \- Expanded Medicare that includes dental, hearing, and vision coverage
\- Universal pre-K and tuition-free community college
\- Making the expanded child tax credit permanent
\- Paid family and medical leave
\- Measures to address our climate crisis
\- Citizenship pathway for DACA and other immigrants **Put simply, this legislation is one of the most important steps that we can take to address the challenges that working families face on a daily basis. This bill touches almost every American at every stage of life.**

In Texas, the GOP is using their trifecta to take away our constitutional rights and suppress our vote. We can’t stand by. We must send Democrats to Congress who are willing to actively advocate for working families, not just support policies in theory. We must pass the $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill that delivers for the American people.

[**That's what I'll do if elected and why I'm asking for your support toward my grassroots campaign to be more than a rubber stamp, but a champion for working families in Congress. Will you chip in $3 to help get me there today? We have our first major end of quarter deadline coming up at the end of the month -- let's get a headstart.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35381745/304887607/77586780?refcode=em-9721-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA1MGRjYi0yYjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qVC6gx5PkZL_lfWKtVtfPzjARBAyDIeR_WZsfnFF34=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35381746/304887608/77586780?refcode=em-9721-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA1MGRjYi0yYjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qVC6gx5PkZL_lfWKtVtfPzjARBAyDIeR_WZsfnFF34=)

clean_body: I'll be more than a rubber stamp, I'll be a champion for working families in Congress. | = Friend, I hope you enjoyed Labor Day weekend. It's important to recognize that working Americans create all the wealth in our country. Last week, Senator Joe Manchin wrote an op-ed detailing why he won't support the $3.5 trillion dollar reconciliation package. This is devastating for working families that desperately need what this bill delivers: \- Expanded Medicare that includes dental, hearing, and vision coverage \- Universal pre-K and tuition-free community college \- Making the expanded child tax credit permanent \- Paid family and medical leave \- Measures to address our climate crisis \- Citizenship pathway for DACA and other immigrants Put simply, this legislation is one of the most important steps that we can take to address the challenges that working families face on a daily basis. This bill touches almost every American at every stage of life. In Texas, the GOP is using their trifecta to take away our constitutional rights and suppress our vote. We can’t stand by. We must send Democrats to Congress who are willing to actively advocate for working families, not just support policies in theory. We must pass the $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill that delivers for the American people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for chipping in, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Trump endorsed our GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

**Donald Trump gave his "complete and total endorsement" to one of our Republican opponents.**
We can't let Trump and the GOP take this open seat next year. Will you rush $3 to give us the resources to fight back and send Democrat Malcolm Kenyatta to the Senate to fight for working families?
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35381772/304887657/-353695395?refcode2=92d58723-2b10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210907-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmQ1ODcyMy0yYjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_pfFahsgDv7tIxwNVPva3j2YEFOW_NRKNZftDUVrsE=)**
Look, Republican Pat Toomey has been enough of a disgrace to working Pennsylvanians. We can't afford for someone more extreme to take his place.
The Republican that Trump endorsed called women's rights "nonsense" and continues to spread the dangerous misinformation that led to the violent insurrection on our nation's capitol in January.
If this Trump-endorsed Republican wins this race, we can say goodbye to any hope of expanding our Democratic Senate majority and delivering a government that works for working people.
Telling you this brings me no joy, but I promised to always tell the truth and say what the hell I think.
And now that Trump is officially involved, we know this candidate is going to raise a ton of money off of this endorsement.
**So I need as many folks as possible to stand with me today to show that working people are united in our fight to defeat Trumpism.**
[If you're able, will you please pitch in $3 today to help us fight back? Every donation makes a big difference in this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35381773/304887658/-353695395?refcode2=92d58723-2b10-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210907-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmQ1ODcyMy0yYjEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_pfFahsgDv7tIxwNVPva3j2YEFOW_NRKNZftDUVrsE=)

The same horrendous Republicans that tried to overturn our election are trying to recall California’s Democratic Governor -- Republicans like Ken Calvert.

We’re taking a stand against Calvert’s continued misrepresentation of our state, and we need 800 Democrats to help us defeat him! » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df

REJECT THE GOP’S RECALL: RUSH $3 TO DEFEAT KEN CALVERT » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df

body:

---
The left is scared, Peter.

_Before I even announced my Senate candidacy in Georgia_ , **my Democrat opponent sent out emails and text messages about my campaign.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58279674:62ClML2Ns:m:1:3253819041:F4DB9F29593144C42CD678DC1B27250A:r)

Will you join my team right now? While I just announced my campaign, the battle to win the Senate majority has been underway for months - and that fight runs straight through Georgia!

I need your help. Please chip in - **[even $5 will help give my campaign the momentum it needs to fend off my opponent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58279674:62ClML2Ns:m:1:3253819041:F4DB9F29593144C42CD678DC1B27250A:r)**

subject: “One of the most shameful things”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
Our military presence is 100% gone and America’s longest war has officially ended in surrender and defeat. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=8969f5bc5b0d428586bf9ee11557298d&_e=HN7OiN2eS_byHOA_FwQnTRE09eAziaAPbFvPxOOAY3PuCLOwR9aUleGpf8tGfJAywC_xi16-iXJSv3DD_LE35pugLV1KbKSY9qkf8xVt2iIvVjlSkVtYYXqujQE0SVZNHeExKHpCTfHcAxkQzJLKGrf9UtpqSXlS-wWg_tG5MiXDCTROcyIuBHMMZJBhBUWzwwRu8UWPbpXoxbPyAiZTMRbpDH83FwZouLieWbtUXq4TeKCBZKScU2vbm6bjC6FRvf6BH8ZXZGVcM3Is5V6GNimRUKzj19043hPJ3dJyBptTXqiPHtk6q7rSd_WciM8RDx4nr8K60BeX3JB5-Qk5zCsK_qoGQ0ztj8xG2rhn60RIPo1dMHqDVegAbUF4riX3idCECQLh_eOFAfwU3xImoJMvYOR1dnjGviqQV6NT0eRQFPP6KlZqgRz6qLAsoMwMIs1mTA88YfABeznoOhEm6pC936nwYn3k9wsdjzqTOUY%3D) Friend, There are zero American troops in Afghanistan but there are a couple hundred American citizens abandoned and behind enemy lines. As a nation, we have a responsibility to get every single one of them out.

_But it looks like Democrats have other plans._

**In fact,****_every single Democrat in Congress_**** voted against my bill that would have required the Biden Administration to give daily reports on how many people are still waiting to get out of Afghanistan.** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=8969f5bc5b0d428586bf9ee11557298d&_e=HN7OiN2eS_byHOA_FwQnTRE09eAziaAPbFvPxOOAY3PuCLOwR9aUleGpf8tGfJAywC_xi16-iXJSv3DD_LE35pugLV1KbKSY9qkf8xVt2iIvVjlSkVtYYXqujQE0SVZNHeExKHpCTfHcAxkQzJLKGrf9UtpqSXlS-wWg_tG5MiXDCTROcyIuBHMMZJBhBUWzwwRu8UWPbpXoxbPyAiZTMRbpDH83FwZouLieWbtUXq4TeKCBZKScU2vbm6bjC6FReAN0HgzYFgjRX1J-7Dkhw1JOXCkhVoGPVuJVQOnkkQcT5MOVzsos8Z1TDnNe67mkU0pF9NqMFjVaLbZdcKygHjmpPBd5hLJliUt8YcwTFNHfN4gMxWCgCeaAWJI1GrjS9Vk1eS5Uy15QB34-_jeWkFDTDMhd_CUYQqML09UfVQzoL21sSbk-4Y965ZSjQOOlA7b0OvdHXdXK8zy4Oq2s_j0EWJhocLPWywbXd0Ux87A%3D) Friend, here’s why Democrats rejected this bill: They didn’t want to take any time or resources away from their #1 priority –– passing the **$3.5 trillion** “Bernie blowout budget” that is packed full of nonsense progressive agenda items. _This is shameful. The facts speak for themselves, and it’s unthinkable that this is what has become of Congress._ [**Add your name if you agree that Democrats need to rethink their priorities >>>**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=8969f5bc5b0d428586bf9ee11557298d&_e=HN7OiN2eS_byHOA_FwQnTRE09eAziaAPbFvPxOOAY3PuCLOwR9aUleGpf8tGfJAywC_xi16-iXJSv3DD_LE35pugLV1KbKSY9qkf8xVt2iIvVjlSkVtYYXqujQE0SVZNHeExKHpCTfHcAxkQzJLKGrf9UtpqSXlS-wWg_tG5MiXDCTROcyIuBHMMZJBhBUWzwwRu8UWPbpXoxbPyAiZTMRbpDH83FwZouLieWbtUXq4TeKCBZKScU2vbm6bjC6FRxwltY91Muki3LvgmhcfY_9o3q6rkFYTbAFL9x2jTKrrL8VIH0fDvT85_DZpmgt-51Kmqa0-cN6ShMzznmDbAc2kAxxlzsu9-BQ2o0QI71Sncg1AgXcCsIEQFbdNZGz5FaFSVSjqv0RvP87KgYltwLP5ln2bzDh293Fud8csU7gWPB5Jim5Qi-LzD2a8QECxdELSkR0e5UB9nUQ1CELN7nWWLWaQSpYfPim6ZqeoCDjE%3D) Thank you, Patrick McNulty | |

| | Hey Derek, **In just 10 short days, Virginians will start casting their ballots across the commonwealth.** This year, it isn’t just the elected officials that folks are voting for, it’s the future of our commonwealth. Abortion access is on the ballot. Climate change is on the ballot. Criminal justice reform is on the ballot. A living wage is on the ballot. The Republican National Committee is sending an army of field staffers to Virginia so we need to make sure our mobilization efforts are bigger and bolder in order to keep Glenn Youngkin out of the Governor’s mansion and protect the progress we’ve made over the last few years. **I just checked our fundraising numbers and we’re currently still $16,327 away from our $28,000 goal to stop Glenn Youngkin’s army of field staffers and his right-wing, Trump loyalist agenda. body:
To say that last week was difficult for our country is an understatement. From Texas’ ban on abortion to the devastating effects of the climate crisis hitting communities from coast to coast, it’s clear we need to be laser focused on bold steps that move us forward.
#
Peter,
To say that last week was difficult for our country is an understatement. From Texas’ ban on abortion to the devastating effects of the climate crisis hitting communities from coast to coast, it’s clear we need to be laser focused on bold steps that move us forward.
Right now is the time to have leaders in our state that will fight for the many issues affecting the people of Washington state: From rebuilding our physical infrastructure and addressing the impacts of climate change, to supporting working families with affordable child care, paid leave, and more.
Instead, Washington state Republicans welcomed Matt Gaetz to our state with open arms. This is the same Matt Gaetz who’s under federal investigation for sex trafficking of minors and remains one of Trump’s biggest supporters by spreading lies about the 2020 election.
Washington state leaders should be helping our families, not hosting out-of-touch, extreme politicians like Matt Gaetz.
**[Will you help us fight back against this display of right-wing extremism and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate by splitting a $5 contribution right now to Patty Murray and Washington State Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35383337/304892158/-1274506055?refcode=pm_em_210907_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRjNzFiYi0zMTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w4H0dqQpGwrc3hG_7yOO__GnocXYCEZN5y08k1upLt8=)**

clean_body: To say that last week was difficult for our country is an understatement. From Texas’ ban on abortion to the devastating effects of the climate crisis hitting communities from coast to coast, it’s clear we need to be laser focused on bold steps that move us forward. Peter, To say that last week was difficult for our country is an understatement. From Texas’ ban on abortion to the devastating effects of the climate crisis hitting communities from coast to coast, it’s clear we need to be laser focused on bold steps that move us forward. Right now is the time to have leaders in our state that will fight for the many issues affecting the people of Washington state: From rebuilding our physical infrastructure and addressing the impacts of climate change, to supporting working families with affordable child care, paid leave, and more. Instead, Washington state Republicans welcomed Matt Gaetz to our state with open arms. This is the same Matt Gaetz who’s under federal investigation for sex trafficking of minors and remains one of Trump’s biggest supporters by spreading lies about the 2020 election. Washington state leaders should be helping our families, not hosting out-of-touch, extreme politicians like Matt Gaetz. = We absolutely cannot afford to have GOP leaders like Gaetz lead our state, Peter. So today Democrats must come together and fight to make sure Republicans can never execute this kind of agenda here in Washington. **= Thank you, Team Patty = As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. In the early 1900s, many Americans worked 6 days a week.

Then, in 1938, Congress set the workweek to 5 days.

Now, over 80 years later, as productivity has skyrocketed while more Americans are simultaneously facing burnout than ever before, _isn’t it time we once again rethink the work week?_

**"McCarthy phone records eyed by Jan. 6 investigators"**
_\- Politico_
Friend,

Let's review how Kevin McCarthy's trying to stonewall the investigation into January 6th: **FIRST:** He endorsed a bipartisan investigation into Jan. 6th shortly after the insurrection. He even suggested Trump was partially responsible.

**THEN:** He met with Trump and completely flip-flopped. He then tried to block the investigation, refused to appoint Republicans to the committee, and even threatened companies that comply with lawful orders to preserve cell phone records.

**NOW:** We recently got word that the House committee is actually seeking to expose MCCARTHY'S phone records from Jan 6th. **It's no wonder McCarthy is going to great lengths to stop this investigation. He's either trying to protect Trump, or he's afraid of what the committee will find out about his role that day.**

We need to keep applying pressure. It's going to take a ton of people chipping in small contributions to make sure everyone knows that Marisa is the viable Democrat running against McCarthy. That's where you come in:

clean_body: He's either trying to protect Trump, or he's afraid of what the committee will find about his role on January 6th. | = "McCarthy phone records eyed by Jan. 6 investigators" \- Politico Friend, Let's review how Kevin McCarthy's trying to stonewall the investigation into January 6th: FIRST: He endorsed a bipartisan investigation into Jan. 6th shortly after the insurrection. He even suggested Trump was partially responsible. THEN: He met with Trump and completely flip-flopped. He then tried to block the investigation, refused to appoint Republicans to the committee, and even threatened companies that comply with lawful orders to preserve cell phone records. NOW: We recently got word that the House committee is actually seeking to expose MCCARTHY'S phone records from Jan 6th. It's no wonder McCarthy is going to great lengths to stop this investigation. He's either trying to protect Trump, or he's afraid of what the committee will find out about his role that day. We need to keep applying pressure. My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

clean_body: Friends, Keeping America safe starts with securing our border and backing our police officers. We need a strong leader who will work to secure our elections, protect Arizona jobs, and hold the Biden Administration accountable.As Attorney General, that’s exactly what I’ll work to accomplish starting on Day 1. Now, I want to know what issues matter most to you. Official Tiffany Shedd Priority Survey Email: Response: PENDING Is this correct? My team sent you a priority survey last week, but we haven’t seen your response yet. Will you take the survey and let me know your thoughts? What issue matters most to you? Take the survey and let us know your thoughts: . Thank you, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

Our Republican opponent John Katko is running a campaign powered by corporate PACs and special interest groups. He ended last quarter with nearly $1 million dollars thanks in large part to blank checks from wealthy corporations.
Francis is doing the exact opposite. He’s running a campaign that relies on everyday supporters like you to keep us going and lead us to victory.
**That’s why your endorsement is so important to us.** The only way we’ll defeat John Katko and flip New York’s 24th District is by building a strong, people-powered, grassroots movement from the very beginning.

The response has been overwhelmingly positive. And we’re well on our way to defeating John Katko and flipping NY-24 from red to blue in 2022. But first, we need your Official Endorsement. | | | Our Republican opponent John Katko is running a campaign powered by corporate PACs and special interest groups. He ended last quarter with nearly $1 million dollars thanks in large part to blank checks from wealthy corporations. Francis is doing the exact opposite. He’s running a campaign that relies on everyday supporters like you to keep us going and lead us to victory. That’s why your endorsement is so important to us. **Things Biden could be doing right now:**
* Consoling the families of the Marines who lost their lives
* Planning to rescue the California school children stranded in Afghanistan

* Visiting Americans whose lives were destroyed by the hurricanes
* Doing anything Presidential

Biden is coming to California in an 11th hour scramble to try and save the worst governor in America - Gavin Newsom - from being recalled on September 14th.

It all starts with this recall. The Left is scared that if Newsom gets recalled, the conservative wave will engulf the country. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Not again (re: the filibuster)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Women’s Health Protection Act can protect abortion rights for all. But only if we get rid of the filibuster.
#
Peter,
It’s clear what Congress must do in response to Republicans in Texas passsing a cruel 6-week abortion ban and Trump’s conservative Supreme Court letting this dangerous restriction remain in effect: **We must end the filibuster, pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, and protect abortion rights.**
I am continuing to lead on this urgent fight to end the filibuster. Democrats in the Senate have the power to get rid of this archaic, racist rule, and they need to do it right now. Abortion rights, voting rights, civil rights, our environment, and so much more is on the line.
**[Can you chip in to fuel my fight to end the filibuster and protect reproductive freedom nationwide? Inaction is not an option, as states across the country begin following Texas’s lead in ending abortion access.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5687?refcode=em20210907-612&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=612%2E420207%2EkoIVw3)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5687?refcode=em20210907-612&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=612%2E420207%2EkoIVw3)**
**The Women’s Health Protection Act would codify the right to abortion care** and the right of health care professionals to provide abortion care, free from unnecessary, punitive restrictions. It would also create a safeguard against abortion bans and medically unnecessary restrictions.
We MUST pass this bill. The Texas law stripped abortion rights away from millions of people; now other states like Florida are moving quickly to pass similar bans. We can’t waste any more time, especially not on something so destructive as the filibuster. End the filibuster, then pass laws to protect abortion rights, voting rights, the environment, and more.
**[Contribute $3 or anything you can to support my work to end the filibuster and pass federal protections for abortion rights. The Texas ban is already in effect — we must take action right now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5687?refcode=em20210907-612&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=612%2E420207%2EkoIVw3)**
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5687?refcode=em20210907-612&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=612%2E420207%2EkoIVw3)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210907-612-footer&t=24&refcode2=612_420207_koIVw3&akid=612%2E420207%2EkoIVw3)**

Now, newly released documents show something we have suspected for a long time; Anthony Fauci repeatedly and deliberately mislead Congress and the American people.

**Now, resignation is not enough. Anthony Fauci must face a Congressional inquiry.**
[**HOLD FAUCI ACCOUNTABLE >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d466d5063a554ece9bf883359b65ca93&_e=pbx4ewqQ25Ub0LHOPsxK5yXC3BC4sGG_3v4AJKx8wtNo1mZ16miSl9r8f1TX8o7L92ZtZvNRk0v8pLBst4lmQLGgS0YIEgyAVojTVVfLNAHS8PGGSihZ5JI8GB2mGXmKoseQzC5_TZ2ATjIRR2DevJmBV7HlT3TQj11onA9EVJyBGeM8gcel6Rw7S9dTTsYFEaGIeG05N3P6sWRrJBRUoVY3SSguVX-RhjtMHnk1hWVf-FuLquHSFObcRMmDyYSw8xc2Ft3WYv1wDYoKwXSUomR4l5-j8uLIlABpJ-gN_VY6g4lJmzUxVpJ712Xu2fhmZ19Y7v46SfYe3RQvK1gy4mt9VvgdbM_cDLr0evAv8k9994L4IY5J-M7GSrrvtAQLDNsxUnprp_KESv9SjDI51g%3D%3D)

Will you stand with me in my fight to expose the truth?

clean_body: | | Peter, Anthony Fauci has lost public confidence, and cannot be trusted. Earlier in the summer, I called on him to resign, and Now, newly released documents show something we have suspected for a long time; Anthony Fauci repeatedly and deliberately mislead Congress and the American people. Now, resignation is not enough. Anthony Fauci must face a Congressional inquiry. The American public deserves the TRUTH from Fauci, and we will get it one way or another! I’m redoubling my calls for his resignation, and I am calling on a Congressional Inquiry into the truthfulness of his previous testimony. Will you stand with me in my fight to expose the truth? In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Mark Warner, TONIGHT to defeat anti-choice extremists this November. Can I count on you to split a $5 donation now to our Democratic campaigns?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35385189/304903321/-1870219995?refcode=mw_em_210907_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2NjOGM1My0zYTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jehDf2YhXeEP0QTfYcXEUT1oWB8qlfLloLQ9URfgyZ8=)_** An individual’s right to make her own choices for their body is not up for negotiation. But in the wake of the Texas bill banning access to safe, legal abortion -- our Republican opponent fully supports a six week ban on abortion for all Virginians. **It’s never been more important to have a pro-choice Lt. Governor in our legislature.** With our Virginia Senate tied on choice, the Lt. Governor is the last line of defense for our rights to legal abortion. **_[Derek, I’m a fierce advocate for protecting a woman’s right to choose. Will you split $5 now to elect me as Virginia’s next Lieutenant Governor -- where I’ll _always_ fight for this fundamental right.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35385190/304903323/-1870219995?refcode=mw_em_210907_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2NjOGM1My0zYTEwLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jehDf2YhXeEP0QTfYcXEUT1oWB8qlfLloLQ9URfgyZ8=)_** Thank you, Hala Ayala

name: Mark Walker
subject: We can’t afford to lose the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Taking back the Senate is crucial to stopping liberal Dems from packing the court. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/3fe91038ea8a6471c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, Conservatives have a razor-thin majority on the Supreme Court, and it almost killed Texas’s Heartbeat Bill. This bill bans abortions after a heartbeat is detected, about 6 weeks into a pregnancy. Last week, a divided Supreme Court declined to block the law in a 5-4 ruling. Once again, _Justice Roberts sided with the three liberal justices._ This highlights just how important our Conservative majority is on the Supreme Court. If it weren’t for President Trump’s appointments, there would have been a devastating ruling for the pro-life community and all those who value our country’s future. [**DEFEND LIFE & DEFEND OUR MAJORITY: DONATE NOW!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/6f5c56b3dc2adbc2c3d6b838967d376c/35903) It’s clear now, with a waning majority and Justice Roberts siding with the liberal faction, that **we cannot afford to let President Biden install more liberal justices on the court**. We must hold a Conservative majority if we want any hopes of ensuring the right to life of _every_ unborn child. Our country is at a crossroads, Peter. **[If you support my fight to defend the right to life, I need your support right now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/f73c46e500b33beac3d6b838967d376c/35903)**. The radical left’s push to expand abortion access is growing, propped up by billions in dark money from groups like Planned Parenthood. But that isn’t the only thing at stake. If the Biden Administration appoints more justices to vacant seats, _or packs the court with their own hand-picked liberal activists,_ our country will be in grave danger and could be lost for generations _._ Peter, I don’t want us to wake up one morning and not recognize the country we’ve fought so hard to protect. It isn’t just the right to life that’s at stake. It’s the 2nd Amendment, election security, the freedom of speech, and our entire Constitution that will come under fire. Don’t let us lose the Supreme Court. **[Help take back the Senate right now to defend our Conservative majority – it could be our last line of defense](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/8d82b554dd9ab5fdc3d6b838967d376c/35903)**. For America,
Mark Walker | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/3f46a9b9bf82eec8c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/43674001127b8273c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/a8532ab08b0ec935c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/084313a120973f5ac3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/d56976dcbe456641/7abf2fc66c94f3a3c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

This bill bans abortions after a heartbeat is detected, about 6 weeks into a pregnancy. Last week, a divided Supreme Court declined to block the law in a 5-4 ruling. Once again, Justice Roberts sided with the three liberal justices. This highlights just how important our Conservative majority is on the Supreme Court. If it weren’t for President Trump’s appointments, there would have been a devastating ruling for the pro-life community and all those who value our country’s future. It’s clear now, with a waning majority and Justice Roberts siding with the liberal faction, that we cannot afford to let President Biden install more liberal justices on the court. We must hold a Conservative majority if we want any hopes of ensuring the right to life of every unborn child. Our country is at a crossroads, Peter. . The radical left’s push to expand abortion access is growing, propped up by billions in dark money from groups like Planned Parenthood. But that isn’t the only thing at stake. If the Biden Administration appoints more justices to vacant seats, or packs the court with their own hand-picked liberal activists, our country will be in grave danger and could be lost for generations . Peter, I don’t want us to wake up one morning and not recognize the country we’ve fought so hard to protect. It isn’t just the right to life that’s at stake. It’s the 2nd Amendment, election security, the freedom of speech, and our entire Constitution that will come under fire. Don’t let us lose the Supreme Court. . For America, Mark Walker | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Walker4NC

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Take it from me, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Among registered Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is in the lead!
#
This is big, Peter.
Have you seen the latest polling on our race for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania? 👀
Among registered Pennsylvania voters, **John Fetterman is in the lead!**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29665?refcode=em20210907-2557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2557%2E434096%2Ex0pvgj)
Voters know that John is the best candidate to go the distance in this race — and the data has shown that he's the *only* Democratic candidate who can beat leading Republicans vying to replace outgoing Senator Pat Toomey.
[**_Check out these numbers for yourself, Peter — then, can you rush a donation of $5 or more to help fund our campaign to elect John Fetterman and flip Pennsylvania blue? With a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, your donation helps prevent the possibility of Republicans + Mitch McConnell regaining power in Pennsylvania._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29665?refcode=em20210907-2557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2557%2E434096%2Ex0pvgj)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29665?refcode=em20210907-2557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2557%2E434096%2Ex0pvgj)**
Seeing John ahead in the polls right now gives me a lot of energy. He’s our single-best shot at flipping Pennsylvania and saving our Democratic Senate majority. But take it from me: We can’t get complacent or take anything for granted at any point during this election.
The Republicans are biding their time to start pouring dark Super PAC money into Pennsylvania as soon as they see John leading the field. After all, the last time this seat was up in 2016, it became the most expensive Senate race in all of U.S. history.
**We can fend off future Republican attacks — and ensure John stays ahead of the pack — if we raise enough at this crucial early stage of the race.**
[**_So if you’re in a place to do so, can you make a donation of $5 or more to our campaign? Click here to donate directly._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29665?refcode=em20210907-2557&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2557%2E434096%2Ex0pvgj)
Thanks for all you do to support our campaign,
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210907-2557-footer-test-ctrl&t=27&refcode2=2557_434096_x0pvgj&akid=2557%2E434096%2Ex0pvgj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: SB 1 was just signed into law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

It finally happened.

Just moments ago, Texas Governor Greg Abbott signed SB 1, one of the most
restrictive voter suppression bills in the country, into law.

There’s no other way around it: They're trying to restrict,
and ultimately kill, democracy.

At Powered by People, we're working to expand and save it.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46937?refcode=ema20210907-152829&t=1001&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu ]Please, make a donation of any amount today to help fund this next
phase in the fight for voting rights. Your support will aid our work to
push Congress and President Biden to pass voting protections that can
restore our ability to elect leaders who truly represent the people of
this state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46937?refcode=ema20210907-152829&amount=3&t=1020&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu ]Contribute $3

We won’t be able to win this fight without support from people like you.
You can find Beto’s email from last week below, where he outlines what we
have to do in the weeks and months ahead.

Thank you for all you’ve given this fight,

Powered by People

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Beto O'Rourke
Date: Tue, Aug 31, 2021
Subject: SB 1 is headed to Governor Abbott’s desk.

Voter suppression has passed in Texas.

A moment ago, both houses of the state legislature passed the final
version of SB 1, the bill designed to subvert democracy and keep hundreds
of thousands of Texans from participating in our elections.

I want to be very candid about what this means for our democracy now that
the bill is on its way to Governor Abbott’s desk.

Once signed, we’ll have three months before this law goes into effect,
meaning if Congress and President Biden don’t move quickly to pass voting
rights legislation that would override this bill, Republicans will be
allowed to cement their power in Texas while skirting accountability for
this state’s 57,000 COVID deaths, the power grid failures that have killed
over 700 Texans, our place as the most uninsured state in the nation, and
a slew of other failures that continue to threaten our health, safety, and
livelihoods.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46937?refcode=ema20210907-152829&t=1021&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu ]As we confront this new phase of the fight to save voting rights in
Texas, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you can
to support Powered by People’s work to push Congress and President Biden
to pass voting protections that can save our democracy and restore our
ability to elect leaders who truly represent the people of this state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46937?refcode=ema20210907-152829&amount=3&t=1040&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu ]Contribute $3

Here’s what gives me hope that we can get this done:

In the effort to stop this voter suppression bill, Texans have shown the
nation the level of courage and tenacity that it’s going to take to stop
this slide and save our democracy before it’s too late. Because of the
support of people like you, we’ve been able to hold some of the largest
voting rights rallies that this state has seen in decades, engage the
conscience of the nation, lead the democratic response to the
authoritarian threat prompted by the Big Lie, and take this fight to the
one place it can be won: our nation’s capital.

And while we push at the federal level, Powered by People will continue to
spend every day working to register new voters, host phone banks and
in-person canvasses in Texas counties that are often neglected, and do
everything we can to bring more people into our democracy so that we can
build a better, more responsive government in this state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46937?refcode=ema20210907-152829&t=1041&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu ]We won’t be able to win this fight without people like you. By joining
this effort and making a donation to Powered by People, you’ll help us
continue to give this fight everything we’ve got.

Always grateful to be in this fight with you,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46937?refcode=ema20210907-152829&t=1042&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1043&akid=152829%2E444211%2EfW3suu

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm about to ask for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=794%2E3611125%2EO2Abqv ][IMG]

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2465?t=1007&akid=794%2E3611125%2EO2Abqv ]Friends -- I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 to my campaign.
But first, a few facts about this race:

1. Ohio’s open Senate seat could decide if we’re able to hold our slim
Democratic Senate majority. With a 50/50 split, we can’t afford to
lose a single battleground race like this one.
2. National Republicans are already pouring millions of dollars into this
race. One right-wing billionaire alone dropped $10 million into a
super PAC.
3. I have multiple Republican millionaire opponents -- not one of them is
looking out for the working class. We need to elect a Senator who will
fight to cut workers in on the deal, not leave them behind.
4. We have a huge FEC deadline this month, and we need to post strong
fundraising numbers. National Republicans will be judging our report
to see just how strong (or vulnerable) our campaign is.

We need to raise another $3,500 today to stay on track. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2465?t=1008&akid=794%2E3611125%2EO2Abqv ]So, will you
chip in just $5?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/2465?t=1009&akid=794%2E3611125%2EO2Abqv ]Donate $5

Together, I know we can pull this off.

-- Tim

subject: Kevin McCarthy is scared.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
And he’s an embarrassment to CA-23. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLogfpTJVRLvunD2WkacMUgODV8hwFPacfm6TlvqIGbGma0mGK6DTsH6OjquT-muMsQ-Hqfn8LEbPoeuoxlEKs86byWyLMiHZ1519tKuF36SUsmSZaiAsCiCQvUJwBN70QGHmC-gB-y-S-XHrayo16hhovVQVCeIctyJ-YlzGJNa5bmkVqhgg8RbY786GLQQT7VxUllxrJ6JPJR_m8J3Z2apH29EuDOkgq8wKhMCKARLqZGDDZZw0BCM7mbj6ZEZYYs2NDVvQ4tP_W6xDeAUyP6B_ommzsTMm7TXNIZjxGSantAfjMXrLXbek4-yA2dGK8V/3f4/mK4LBlxcROmI6pgO_OtpPQ/h0/9c0aDxqk1K6QuHjb3gkni6jMRB4O-tM63RzY-d2fiLw)
---
Kevin McCarthy is scared, folks.

He’s scared of Donald Trump; he’s scared of the facts; he’s scared of losing his seat to Bruno Amato -- **[donate to our campaign today to make him even more scared!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoMlWftfe6n0Lnuy4IcA77Lzts0tV0Ek6G5wg1Q7Ho2-44aLODaRZGiIY3-aOh2OpMol9zURBATYZkn9YMnTOVBBA8aJ3pSJCJPMHfq4kvUyCbvsV8I5jvtQxzsjytzgK_bHtLUpRMZNUY_t7GAKgmDEEX-QmQySUafOdgDpPil1kMIs66H2NaKjZUrlMrevMtd8Ukoez9KzjIc_16mue0QCyqJF7V3yAhSftLn0MQWd8azTjrYnH44sEPGK8G9WP9TQg0tjFT6n3YKZr7hOwscbh5ATaxgW57eQwjYMHDTTbTvaqlTFmHRXmXz6ib70LdW7nfA3oesSleowNGFYOwtkCExGU4Xv9b5oh2RdDzPKUjX-0HixabbSU0pL4MaHJk/3f4/mK4LBlxcROmI6pgO_OtpPQ/h1/vAcp7Ged_h9VPgzWyCVOpQa348qwVObs0bzXjAHDO3M)**

Just last week, he threatened telecommunication and social media companies to not comply with any requests from the House Select Committee in an attempt to hide the truth about what happened on January 6th -- when a mob of far-right insurrections emboldened by Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and the Big Lie stormed the Capitol.

McCarthy insinuated that a Republican majority would take legal action against these companies if they shared data from that day with Congress.

**Since he is so scared about what they will find, we can only assume that McCarthy has something to hide.

clean_body: And he’s an embarrassment to CA-23. | | | Kevin McCarthy is scared, folks. He’s scared of Donald Trump; he’s scared of the facts; he’s scared of losing his seat to Bruno Amato -- Just last week, he threatened telecommunication and social media companies to not comply with any requests from the House Select Committee in an attempt to hide the truth about what happened on January 6th -- when a mob of far-right insurrections emboldened by Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and the Big Lie stormed the Capitol. McCarthy insinuated that a Republican majority would take legal action against these companies if they shared data from that day with Congress. Since he is so scared about what they will find, we can only assume that McCarthy has something to hide. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Begs Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A New Spark of Liberty](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioocNd4gnOXHn3K0H8xlS3LcvuXMeLjCSNXMVH40si_qAQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_7&n=1) Joe Biden is coming to campaign for Gavin Newsom. Imagine being so afraid of losing your job that you make the president stop doing his. Newsom begged Biden to fly out for a political rally. That's his priority, even as California kids are trapped in Afghanistan. This comes with Election Day now a week away. We had a whirlwind of events in Southern California this weekend, and I was honored to speak about religious liberty at Godspeak Calvary Chapel. [You can watch my full remarks here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioo_lmPZxuSSvXegaAuausepXQRbpfLxk_lYzbnKCbJDGw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_7&n=2). Newsom has attacked religious liberty unlike any governor, and that's no accident. A vibrant faith community is always a threat to a corrupt government. Our next governor must put worship and fellowship beyond the reach of any bureaucrat. Meanwhile, Newsom's NO campaign has become the most cynical in California history. Its lies are being called out by even the mainstream media. Its entire premise is that decline and failure are inevitable. The premise of the YES campaign, by contrast, is that California is worth fighting for. That a free people always has the power to make tomorrow better than today. [Help our campaign turn out the vote in the crucial final week](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_7&n=3) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxEPQug2XXAWyxLd3AxVlzfDBG8_8yTO986allpoKUgyQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_7&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_7&n=5)

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: I'm on the Tucker Carlson Show Tonight!
body:
| | | | You don't want to miss this one.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey will be appearing on Tucker Carlson show tonight with guest host Brian Kilmeade.
Patrick will be discussing his lawsuit against the Department of Homeland Security, where he pressed the Court to reconsider the termination of President Trump's "Remain in Mexico" policy. Patrick has argued that the Biden Administration policy has opened up many new holes in the border that allow deadly fentanyl to flow through.
As you may know, the Supreme Court — in a related case — recently reinstated the "Remain in Mexico Policy" policy and declared the Biden approach in violation of the law.
Tune in tonight to learn more about what Patrick is doing to fight against open borders and deadly narcotics!
Enjoy!
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia

subject: Single-Sign-On Focus Group Invitation Enclosed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
