Fellow Conservative,

My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, **I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization,_let me tell you why._ **

But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. [**I will need your support after I expose the truth about BLM, so please consider pitching in just $5 or $10 after you read my message.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7ce108d910541b8b2aa89e81417599b&_e=krhlTCjIdMfyAaH9jtlO-f7SIeEariwX8-j-m4BrRIdpzXNgQbMCvIg0eddz6P4mU6K-GVE7gFd9G8PakOPUpeykkg-2a1fp_ek0lSqHF2vTLFXZwL8uls9F9WH8JId7Da8l_j8otMTRxL2cxN3XCFE8BfQ_3hKcC5wMeNKNqzz_zQ9bcPQ-hlGq7UPEYWOKVAG-C3j1iYSzdsrIbHK8ilFsIKLT05Vi05LJSFOiVKxdM_cR2OBmsUyRhCrB24NEwfpv8D8cnjcQ3pbi7vtWmB62WGe6NCx1MLouX1EdEjMpZSvQ2keA9uZTHqVZ5Qb1RYuRVvlxSEhgQwZlYGt1vb3l9kegJ3U7Nsgd_emABovPjCHyU6OKeYYpQS6h8L4-Baj6kV11B35kCy91uJKrMHQkjPC0rvJsGpW0cePY19_3gIm2AcxYxA3yqNHX8A99PDaFL-DPM7xVPZuofvLbdg%3D%3D)

[**STAND UP TO BLM
ELECT A BLACK PATRIOT -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7ce108d910541b8b2aa89e81417599b&_e=krhlTCjIdMfyAaH9jtlO-f7SIeEariwX8-j-m4BrRIdpzXNgQbMCvIg0eddz6P4mU6K-GVE7gFd9G8PakOPUpeykkg-2a1fp_ek0lSqHF2vTLFXZwL8uls9F9WH8JId7Da8l_j8otMTRxL2cxN3XCFE8BfQ_3hKcC5wMeNKNqzz_zQ9bcPQ-hlGq7UPEYWOKVAG-C3j1iYSzdsrIbHK8ilFsIKLT05Vi05LJSFOiVKyNh0JvOkjMlzhSuTxZvq1H6T5w6z3VmRfgDTIPjmzQzOxRT89ohCAbF09iznT6wol02V2mkEFCqoyXpYOmotl5RkUZDZbKDujWKwfs8PZxniY3eieIuTQjVTrBfANt9mfbLXY1FueVt0iGBwh6cO6WP9xFwEZ0DPrgfqUL-AWRkrYUHunrabnRoeeM7OyRnGNQFBbygG3hhk_95Bh8_RHdyy1-DchMkEBHHemHxCc1KQ%3D%3D)
BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white.

You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive.

Over this last Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a _‘symbol of hatred’_ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, _“When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.”_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7ce108d910541b8b2aa89e81417599b&_e=krhlTCjIdMfyAaH9jtlO-f7SIeEariwX8-j-m4BrRIdpzXNgQbMCvIg0eddz6P4mU6K-GVE7gFd9G8PakOPUpeykkg-2a1fp_ek0lSqHF2vTLFXZwL8uls9F9WH8JId7Da8l_j8otMTRxL2cxN3XCFE8BfQ_3hKcC5wMeNKNqzz_zQ9bcPQ-hlGq7UPEYWOKVAG-C3j1iYSzdsrIbHK8ilFsIKLT05Vi05LJSFOiVKw0rfW6qAN0fUKtaI2cgxXELsDbU_SJLPvS8P2rG0x1o3WiCy-PYLKFW6XJXPwFavqAfmj8X4vhcG_j11xo4R54KZXo35-nDMaYYLQqJHhpJ784-lVy2h35K1tOUQ7G24P9kqWvWLvOlGtmm5UrXz_FzkzvNrJBulz9pXeXYoVLsaNXhrjqhzGo_qqB-XnnUIJot6XS4BmAV9C5OQOH-t0PHoS13CW61ObLAPLbRCcVAQ%3D%3D)
I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women.

But the BLM organization uses _anything_ to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice.

[**We cannot allow them to take a symbol of freedom, the American flag, and turn it into a weapon for their agenda. We must stand up right now and fight back against their rhetoric.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7ce108d910541b8b2aa89e81417599b&_e=krhlTCjIdMfyAaH9jtlO-f7SIeEariwX8-j-m4BrRIdpzXNgQbMCvIg0eddz6P4mU6K-GVE7gFd9G8PakOPUpeykkg-2a1fp_ek0lSqHF2vTLFXZwL8uls9F9WH8JId7Da8l_j8otMTRxL2cxN3XCFE8BfQ_3hKcC5wMeNKNqzz_zQ9bcPQ-hlGq7UPEYWOKVAG-C3j1iYSzdsrIbHK8ilFsIKLT05Vi05LJSFOiVKxNB4Gj780dTuqZ6Lqe1tZefBhH72EODZIKpoflPzpf4PBXxJGxhewVeU-yIX0D1ZkxtPR77B0D5wMFNqvf-3AhJjcXkIVJCXKAUk6JSNXY_Zchlw90-xpMv7FoTMJsUvrKQ02i3dFLx3J2voX9aPtvgPKH1X77YVwvPgthHVTej4UNVlRNGTGef0UQwhf8_oPUlu_d8Y_UNkWftvG8JmPH9ltG8H1ymlDFvD12zVmZeA%3D%3D)

Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities.

[**Please, if you are in the position to give, help me deliver the truth about BLM and the Democrats to the entire nation. With your help, we can make meaningful change in Washington and elect a strong black conservative to end the Democrats’ racist Republican narrative.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7ce108d910541b8b2aa89e81417599b&_e=krhlTCjIdMfyAaH9jtlO-f7SIeEariwX8-j-m4BrRIdpzXNgQbMCvIg0eddz6P4mU6K-GVE7gFd9G8PakOPUpeykkg-2a1fp_ek0lSqHF2vTLFXZwL8uls9F9WH8JId7Da8l_j8otMTRxL2cxN3XCFE8BfQ_3hKcC5wMeNKNqzz_zQ9bcPQ-hlGq7UPEYWOKVAG-C3j1iYSzdsrIbHK8ilFsIKLT05Vi05LJSFOiVKySfDXU5QJ7kAEFrjWQEA6vwleLsY6EKDFxzC32Qxr0r3T3DtP2SU12jJcql1wTuwi_MJqvs_E3Q6YGVD7nMBXGADYmTMGIhEnbZjMDosQK85jj07sIIidsBL3XeIK79U-x1eIPo1x4O0-RL8Igc18P8QzOgVotdj1Bh0kXZDRVTW1HFBNFDh8ml3UQolpPUQ8cJgMCiPX0KDNoJ0xAU_keHXAZWrVvPBETcG67vmkyvQ%3D%3D)

Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us an Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Brian Hawkins. I am a black, conservative pastor running for Congress. Although I am African American, as you can see from my photo above, I do NOT support the Black Lives Matter organization,let me tell you why. But first, let me warn you: What I am about to say will get me labeled as an “Uncle Tom” by the radical-Left. They will target my campaign and try to defeat me because I am promoting freedom of thought to the black community. BLM is a racist organization that uses the death of black people to fund and empower Democrats – most of which, are white. You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. Over this last Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a ‘symbol of hatred’ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, “When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.” I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women. But the BLM organization uses anything to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice. Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities. Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach our goals and raise what we need _right now_.

The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.

I won't let them – but I need your help. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals.

**So I'll be direct, Derek: I'm asking you to split a donation – here and now – between my campaign and Common Good VA. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**

| | Dear Friend, As illegal immigrants pour over the southern border in record numbers and the effects of Joe Biden’s policies play out, **everyday Americans are dealing with the consequences... _including us right here in Florida!_** Governor DeSantis has revealed that **70%** of migrants crossing the border illegally say that _FLORIDA_ is their final destination. **We need to say ‘NO’ to footing the bill for Joe Biden’s Border Crisis \- will you join me in speaking out?**
---
| [DON'T LET BIDEN'S CRISIS COME TO FLORIDA](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=46a2c86206&e=c2296cffff "DON'T LET BIDEN'S CRISIS COME TO FLORIDA")

name: Team AOC
subject: These storms and fires are only going to get worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
When folks say a Green New Deal is too expensive or “unrealistic”, these extreme weather events are proof that the cost of inaction is far greater.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210907-2492-header&t=1&akid=2492%2E2526796%2ENjwIrG)
Four states are still recovering from extreme winds and catastrophic flooding caused by Hurricane Ida. Here in New York City, the rapid flood waters trapped many in their homes and resulted in 13 people tragically losing their lives.
Our campaign immediately mobilized into action to provide support and connect our community members to resources they need to recover. Alexandria visited with impacted families over the weekend and our volunteers called and texted 100,000 people to check in on storm victims.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210907?refcode=em20210907-2492-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2492_2526796_NjwIrG&akid=2492%2E2526796%2ENjwIrG)
**While we’re continuing to provide direct support on the ground to those directly impacted, we must also do everything we can right now to prevent future disasters like this.** The damage we’re seeing from Hurricane Ida is just the most recent example of how vulnerable our country’s infrastructure is to extreme weather.
These disasters are going to become more frequent, and we must prepare by immediately transitioning away from fossil fuels and making investments to infrastructure to be more resilient to extreme weather.
**Right now we have a historic opportunity to make those necessary investments by passing the budget reconciliation package in Congress.** This package would include funding for programs like a Civilian Climate Corps: a jobs program dedicated to reducing carbon emissions, enabling a transition to renewable energy, and helping communities recover from climate disasters. Alexandria has been fighting against attempts from both sides of the aisle to water down our infrastructure spending, because she knows that this is the issue of our lifetime and she is not going to back down.
[If you agree we must take this opportunity to make a historic investment in climate-resilient infrastructure to save lives, will you make a $3 contribution to keep up our fight in Congress and ensure that our climate and infrastructure priorities are passed?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210907?refcode=em20210907-2492-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2492_2526796_NjwIrG&akid=2492%2E2526796%2ENjwIrG)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210907?refcode=em20210907-2492-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2492_2526796_NjwIrG&akid=2492%2E2526796%2ENjwIrG)**
Year after year, it’s been politically acceptable to raise the defense budget without a question. **Our government needs to treat our climate and infrastructure spending with the same degree of urgency.**
But the politicians who are holding up that spending — who say it’s too expensive and too unrealistic — are the same ones who have weekly meetings with Exxon lobbyists to influence this debate.
There’s really no way to sugarcoat it: Doing nothing will cost so much more than investing in renewable energy and upgrading our infrastructure — in disaster costs, in healthcare costs, in lives lost.
And we can’t forget: The climate crisis is an inequality crisis that disproportionately affects low-income communities and communities of color. And it will continue to threaten the most vulnerable.
Many deaths in New York during the flooding last week occurred in basement dwellings, many of which are illegal and growing in number due to the unaffordable housing crisis and do not meet safety standards required to keep people safe in incidents like flash floods.
We can’t wait for the next hurricane, wildfire, or winter storm to act. There’s no more time to waste.
Right now we have a crucial moment to pass urgent climate action and strong investments in our infrastructure. [If you can, please chip in $3 or anything you can today to help Alexandria continue this fight and pass historic climate action for working families.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210907?refcode=em20210907-2492-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2492_2526796_NjwIrG&akid=2492%2E2526796%2ENjwIrG)
Thank you,
Team AOC

clean_body: When folks say a Green New Deal is too expensive or “unrealistic”, these extreme weather events are proof that the cost of inaction is far greater. Four states are still recovering from extreme winds and catastrophic flooding caused by Hurricane Ida. Here in New York City, the rapid flood waters trapped many in their homes and resulted in 13 people tragically losing their lives. Our campaign immediately mobilized into action to provide support and connect our community members to resources they need to recover. Alexandria visited with impacted families over the weekend and our volunteers called and texted 100,000 people to check in on storm victims. While we’re continuing to provide direct support on the ground to those directly impacted, we must also do everything we can right now to prevent future disasters like this. The damage we’re seeing from Hurricane Ida is just the most recent example of how vulnerable our country’s infrastructure is to extreme weather. These disasters are going to become more frequent, and we must prepare by immediately transitioning away from fossil fuels and making investments to infrastructure to be more resilient to extreme weather. Right now we have a historic opportunity to make those necessary investments by passing the budget reconciliation package in Congress. This package would include funding for programs like a Civilian Climate Corps: a jobs program dedicated to reducing carbon emissions, enabling a transition to renewable energy, and helping communities recover from climate disasters. Alexandria has been fighting against attempts from both sides of the aisle to water down our infrastructure spending, because she knows that this is the issue of our lifetime and she is not going to back down. Year after year, it’s been politically acceptable to raise the defense budget without a question. Our government needs to treat our climate and infrastructure spending with the same degree of urgency. But the politicians who are holding up that spending — who say it’s too expensive and too unrealistic — are the same ones who have weekly meetings with Exxon lobbyists to influence this debate. There’s really no way to sugarcoat it: Doing nothing will cost so much more than investing in renewable energy and upgrading our infrastructure — in disaster costs, in healthcare costs, in lives lost. And we can’t forget: The climate crisis is an inequality crisis that disproportionately affects low-income communities and communities of color. And it will continue to threaten the most vulnerable. Many deaths in New York during the flooding last week occurred in basement dwellings, many of which are illegal and growing in number due to the unaffordable housing crisis and do not meet safety standards required to keep people safe in incidents like flash floods. We can’t wait for the next hurricane, wildfire, or winter storm to act. There’s no more time to waste. Right now we have a crucial moment to pass urgent climate action and strong investments in our infrastructure. Thank you, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

subject: STUNNING anti-choice rebuke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT the Biden administration's efforts to protect those seeking an abortion in Texas? | | | **_BREAKING: Biden 's Justice Department will protect those seeking an abortion in Texas_**

---
| ****President Biden 's Department of Justice just announced it will PROTECT anyone seeking an abortion in Texas!

As Democrats, we're committed to doing everything we can to defend the right to choose as it comes under attack.

But to win the fight against anti-choice Republicans, we need to know where our best supporters stand.

So let us know:**

Do you SUPPORT the Biden administration's efforts to protect those seeking an abortion in Texas?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2spZWG-)
---|---|---

_**220 responses requested from grassroots Democrats in your state before midnight tonight**_

We were **LIVID** after the Supreme Court allowed Republicans in Texas to enact one of the **STRICTEST** abortion bans in history.

But then we got some INCREDIBLE news: _**The Department of Justice just announced it will PROTECT women seeking an abortion in Texas!**_

We're so proud to see President Biden and our Democrats fighting back against this latest attack on the right to choose.

And we're committed to doing everything we can to defend our progress at this critical moment.

But we can't hope to win the fight against anti-choice Republicans without this grassroots team by our side.

**That 's why we're urgently requesting our best grassroots supporters -- including 220 from your state -- to let us know where they stand on this critical issue.**
**[Quickly: Do you SUPPORT the Biden administration's fight to protect people seeking an abortion in Texas?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2spZWG-)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC
